Tara laughed. "I was really having a craving, this store room job is dangerous, at least I'm not tempted when I'm being the desk."

"Don't worry, I did the same thing yesterday on my lunch," Allyson said. "This stuff is really addictive. Must be something they put in the recipe I guess."

"That would explain all those candy crazed customers we get each day," Tara said. "I don't normally even eat candy that much."

"Me either," Allyson said. "I guess it's easy to snack on the job when we're busy though."

"You want to...uh...have a little before we tidy it all away?"

Allyson nodded.

Tara reached for a pack of gummies, while Allyson grabbed some chocolate. The only sound for a few moments was their constant munching, chewing and tearing wrappers; they barely even looked at each other "a little" turned into "everything on the floor."

They both reached down for their last piece together, and found their hands touching as she grabbed the last bag of chocolate fudge. Looking up, they both realised their hands were still touching, and everything around them was empty wrappers.

"Split them?" Tara shrugged.

"Yeah, sounds good," Allyson blushed, pulling her hand away awkwardly.

Tara opened the bag and divided the contents between them. They quickly finished off what was left, wiping their mouths in unison as they took stock of their unexpected feast. Allyson couldn't believe they had finished off everything. She was also sure she detected a hint of something more when they touched hands...Tara hadn't pulled away...was she...attracted to her? She found herself, for the first time, checking the cute blonde out, and realised that she had been thinking of her as "cute" and "pretty" all day...

"We should get back to work," Tara said, shoving their rubbish into the empty box before tasking it out to the trash.

Nodding in agreement, Allyson got to her feet, straightened up her dress, and headed back out. As she did, she saw Carla gently massaging her stomach for some reason, a noticeable bulge beneath her fingers...

---

By the time the day was over, Allyson had found herself popping back to the store room another three times. Each time, Tara was there, snacking away as she worked, and she offered Allyson another bag of goodies. The amount of sugar she had put in her body over the course of the day must have been extremely high.

"Well girls," Sarah said. "The end of our first, successful, week. Thank you to you all for your hard work, and I'll see you next week!"

"I really need a rest," Tara said, rubbing her aching back as she and Allyson exited the building.

"Me too," Allyson yawned. "Any plans for the weekend?"

"I'm going to sleep in tomorrow and then hit the gym in the afternoon," Tara said. "How about you?"

"Nah, nothing," Allyson shrugged.

"Well, if you're free tomorrow do you want to maybe hang out?" Tara asked.

"Oh...uh...sure, that sounds fun," Allyson blushed. Is she asking me out?

"Cool, I'm a bit short on money until payday, but you could come round to my place for takeout and a movie?" Tara suggested.

"Sure, that sounds good," Allyson smiled.

As they walked away, neither girl noticed Carla behind them, accepting another enormous sack of candy was Sarah...
12121122111.title: End of the week

choices: After finish the pizza, the girls binge on candy...
Tara starts flirting with Allyson...
121211221111.content:
Unsure of what to wear to go round to Tara's place, Allyson chose a casual pair of jeans and a black T-shirt. She still wasn't totally sure if Tara was asking her to hang out as friends or something more, so decided to just go for something neutral. Had they been going out for the night she might have put in more effort, but for just watching movies at Tara's apartment, this seemed like a reasonable choice.

She took a cab to Tara's place and arrived on time for 7:30. Tara opened the door up wearing a pair of denim shorts that hugged her bubble butt, and a low cut top that drew attention to her cleavage. It was loose, but exposed some of her midriff, which Allyson could see was pretty flat, although looking a little soft. Allyson was surprised by how revealing the outfit was, but she was always pretty conservative with her own wardrobe.

"Come in! I ordered Pizza!" Tara said excitedly, ushering Ally inside. "You like Pizza right?"

"Uh, yeah, sure," Allyson said.

Allyson stepped into Tara's front room, which was surprisingly big, much bigger than Ally and Sandy's place. "You live here on your own?" She asked.

"Oh yeah," Tara said, plonking herself down on the couch and folding her legs under her butt. "It's a little pricey but my parents loaned me some money for rent, and once my first paycheck comes in I should be sitting pretty."

"It's really ni-"

Allyson was cut off by the buzzer, and Tara hopped up to collect the Pizza delivery. She had ordered a large with a side of fries, which seemed enough for the two of them, though Allyson had found herself oddly hungry lately and thought maybe she could've eaten a little more. Tara stuck on a movie on Netflix, a horror about a haunted house or something, Allyson wasn't really paying that much attention. Instead focused on eating her Pizza slices, and yet, as she bit down, she found the cheese and tomato strangely bland when compared to all the candy she had been eating this week.

Tara sandwiched two slices and ate them as one, shoving a handful of fries into her mouth as she jumped slightly at a ghost on the TV. Allyson smirked and finished another slice. "So, busy week, huh?"

"Yeah," Tara replied. "I wonder if our second week will be any better? I feel so tired at the end of each day, but I guess it's worth it for the money."

"I'm just worried it'll be like this forever," Allyson said, another pizza slice passing her lips.

"Well, hopefully all our crazy townspeople's will have had enough sugar by the end of the month," Tara laughed.

"I'm not so sure about that," Ally laughed. "They seem to be hooked."

"I mean, it is good stuff..." Tara said, casting a glance over her shoulder at the sack of candy leaning against her wall.

Allyson followed her gaze as she finished her last slice of pizza. "Yeah...can't deny that..."
121211221111.title: Hanging out

choices: Over the next week, Allyson and Tara try and resist their candy urges...
Two weeks later, Allyson finds she is putting on weight...
Allyson gets home and finds Sandy has devoured her candy stash...
1212112211111.content:
As the last of the Pizza was finished, Tara craned her neck around and focused her gaze on the bag of candy in the corner. Both girls were pretty slim, and the Pizza, though not an excessive amount, had left their stomachs bulging slightly, and yet, Allyson felt like she could have eaten more...

Tara hoisted herself out of her seat and began to walk to the sack, retrieving it with a grunt as she slung it over her shoulder and deposited it in front of the couch. "Feel like I need something sweet after all that cheese," she said.

Allyson couldn't help but nod in agreement. "Yeah me too," she said, reaching for a handful of gummies. She stopped herself as her hand closed around the candy, her mind flashing back to just how much of this stuff she had consumed over the past week. It really was quite an excessive amount at this point. She looked over at Tara, who was already biting down on a huge gummy worm. "You don't think maybe we're eating too much of this stuff?"

Tara, cheeks bulging, blushed a little. "Ermm...maybe..." she said between mouthfuls. "I guess it can't be that healthy but...it's only been a week. We'll be sick of it soon."

Allyson smiled. "I guess that's true," she said. She couldn't see herself still finding this stuff amazing after a few weeks. She raised her hand to her mouth and tossed back the gummies, chewing intently as she returned her attention to the horror movie. As the figures on screen screamed and ran down corridors, her hand went back to the sack almost automatically, extending, grabbing candy, putting that candy in her mouth, then going back for more.

Tara did the same, her eyes focused on the TV, but her free hand ferreting more treats into her mouth. The girls were unknowingly ingesting more candy than they had the entire week, chewing and chewing as the sack gradually emptied...

---

For the first time, Allyson reached for some candy and found her hand hitting an empty space. Her attention finally back on what she was doing with her hands, she turned and looked at the sack in surprise...half of it was gone, and she couldn't reach what was at the bottom now from where she sat. Had they really eaten that much between them?

Tara was in a similar predicament, but unlike Allyson, she had chosen to get up and reach down for more. Loading her arms up, she returned to her seat, barely acknowledging Allyson's look of realisation before she returned to chewing. Allyson looked from Tara down to her stomach, which seemed a little rounder than it had been after the Pizza...

I should stop. That was way too much sugar for one night...

Allyson looked at the sack again, and noticed one of those delicious caramel chocolate bars lying on top. Maybe one more...

---

One more turned into a lot more, as Allyson had found herself going back for more almost immediately after the chocolate bar. Tara upended the sack onto the floor at one point, allowing both girls to scoop up whatever they wanted. The candy dwindled as the film went on, and within the next two hours, it was completely gone.

"Did we...did we finish all of that?" Tara suddenly asked, a look of shock on her face.

Allyson ran a hand over her now rather bloated stomach and nodded. "Ermm...yeah...I think we did..."

The girls both looked rather embarrassed about how much they had put away, and when Allyson looked across at her companion, she could see Tara's stomach had bloated out as well, a combination of pizza and candy and soda, all churning away, visible in the gap between her top and her shorts.

"Well, I should probably be going," Allyson said. The combination of candy and pizza had left her feeling pretty groggy, and it was getting late.

"Oh, sure," Tara said, rising from her chair with a grunt. "It was really cool hanging out...even if we did spend most of it eating."

Allyson laughed, realising they hadn't really even spoken once they started on the candy. "Yeah, we'll have to do it again some time," she rose from her chair, her tummy bloating out slightly now she was standing.

Crossing the room, she grabbed her stuff and headed out, saying her goodbyes to Tara as she tiredly made her way home, gently rubbing her stomach absent mindedly...she really needed to cut down on the candy this week.
1212112211111.title: Mutual gorging

choices: Carla has a wardrobe malfunction in the store...
Allyson notices the customers are getting fatter too...
One week later, Allyson has gained another few pounds...
12121122111112.content:
Two weeks had passed since Allyson's trip to Tara's apartment, and things in her life had continued more or less the same since. She went to work, the customers flowed in, she was rushed off her feet, went home, ate candy, slept and repeated this until the weekend. Allyson had previously been a keen hiker, and would meet some of friends for a hike or a bike ride at the weekend, but she had been putting off going out since she started working at the store. The week left her feeling so exhausted that she didn't really want to be on her feet in her free time, so she had started spending her weekends just sitting around the apartment with Sandy.

This had also led to her candy consumption nearly doubling of late, as she was now eating during week and during the weekend, her steady supply of free samples barely getting her through Saturday and leaving her craving more come Sunday morning. Allyson was not completely oblivious to this; she knew that exercise levels were decreasing, and that her consumption of sugary snacks only seemed to be escalating, and yet, she couldn't bring herself to do anything about it. Every time she summoned the willpower to go for a run, she would lose interest just as quickly. She knew she wasn't leading the most healthy lifestyle anymore, but justified it as an unfortunate side effect of her hard work.

What she had been oblivious to, however, was that all that sugar now seemed to be having an effect on her trim figure. Allyson had never really gained or lose weight her entire life, always remaining slim, toned and around the same weight. But over these last few weeks, her sedentary new lifestyle and constant candy snacking had begun to take it's toll. It wasn't exactly a huge gain, but she had noticed her stomach growing softer lately, and felt some of her clothes becoming tighter. After weighing herself, she was shocked to discover that she had gained ten pounds since starting her new job. It was obvious why, but at the moment, it was hardly noticeable, so she hadn't really taken any steps to lose the added pounds.

Her work uniform, which had seemed perfectly fitted to her body when she started, did look a little tighter now. Her skirt dug into the side of her slightly larger tummy, while her shirt was not quite as loose as it had once been. She smoothed a hand over her clothes, looking at herself in the mirror before dismissing her gains. Ten pounds is nothing, I can lose that in week.

---

When she arrived at work, Allyson couldn't help but notice that she wasn't the only one whose uniform looked a little smaller. Tara, busty to begin with, definitely seemed to have put on some weight as well. Her skirt was considerably tighter around her larger looking bubble butt, while her shirt constricted around her breasts, one of the buttons stretching open ever so slightly.

Carla, however, seemed to be packing on the pounds much more quickly. Both Allyson and Tara had noticed their colleague consuming more candy than both of them put together, and she rarely seemed to be without a bag of chocolates in her hand. Most of her extra weight seemed to be going to her butt, which looked increasingly ill suited to her skin tight skirt. Her once flat stomach seemed to bulge all the time now, a layer of pudge visibly pushing out atop the hem of her skirt.

At least I'm not the only one...
12121122111112.title: Effects of the Candy

choices: Allyson and Tara break for lunch and catch up...
Carla enters the store room with a wardrobe malfunction...
121211221111122.content:
Allyson was on restock today, which, as usual led to her sneaking some free samples while she was in the store room. The girls had openly acknowledged to each other last week that they all did this, and, despite Allyson's initial reservations about helping themselves to company property, Sarah had actually begun to actively encourage them to help themselves, as long as there was enough for the customers. That didn't seem like the greatest business model in the world to Allyson, but with the amount of sales they were bringing in, that didn't really seem to matter.

As she restocked the shelves out the front, Allyson couldn't help but recognise a few of their customers. Everyone who came to the store would pretty much be guaranteed to stop by at least once or twice per week, more in some cases, and they amount of they bought seemed to increase with each visit. Allyson caught sight of two girls who had visited the store in the first week; they looked around college age, and on their first visit, had been wearing skin tight jogging gear which exposed toned midriffs.

Now, they were dressed a bit more conservatively, with jeans and loose fitting jumpers, but Allyson couldn't help but notice they looked a little thicker. It was hard to get a good look at them under those sweaters, but their jeans looked incredibly tight, and their butts looked much...larger...than before. The one girl, her hair tied back into pigtails, also seemed to be a lot bustier than Allyson remembered. Maybe they were eating a little too much of this stuff too.

Allyson watched them closely as they filled up a basket each, loading what felt like half the contents of the aisle up before paying for their stuff. Allyson returned to the stock room, wondering just how addicted the town was becoming to this stuff. She was aware of the irony of judging those two girls for their excessive candy purchases, even as she tossed a handful of chocolate caramels into her mouth and bit down...
121211221111122.title: Widening customers

choices: Returning home, Allyson finds Sandy gorging on candy...
By the end of the week, the girls are all struggling with their clothes...
1212112211111222.content:
As Allyson chewed through her current mouthful of chocolates, the door suddenly swung open behind her. Fearing she was about to be found out, Allyson quickly swallowed what was in her mouth and turned around to see Carla slamming the door shut.

"Oh my god, oh my god..." Carla was breathing heavily.

"Erm...are you okay Carla?" Allyson asked.

"My uniform!" Carla squealed.

Allyson just stared at her in confusion for a moment, before her eyes travelled down to Carla's skirt. The purple garment, already tight across Carla's bulbous behind, had almost completely ripped apart. Carla's thick thighs bulged out at the sides, while a long, vertical tear on each side started to form. Carla scrambled to hold it together, but the more she struggled to keep a grip on the fabric, the quicker it unravelled.

Allyson really wasn't sure what to do. She had no real way to help Carla, so was stuck just watching the poor girl panic and rip out of her clothes. It was quite a sight. The logical reason for this was that Carla had put on weight since starting work here, but despite the size of her booty, Allyson didn't think she had gained that much...although she had to admit, as the skirt came away, Carla did look much, much curvier than she had two weeks ago.

"Nooooo!" Carla screamed as her skirt ripped away, fluttering to the floor uselessly. "This can't be happening to me!"

"Are you okay? Erm...your skirt..." Allyson pointed out, uselessly.

"It just starting ripping when I bent over to pick up some candy," Carla moaned, standing there in her frilly, pink panties, which themselves seemed incredibly tight around her two sizeable ass cheeks. Without the skirt, her butt seemed even larger. "Stupid uniform must have shrunk in the wash."

"Yeah, that must be it," Allyson said, trying to sound convincing, though it was obvious to her that Carla had put on quite a few extra pounds over the last two weeks. "I'll fetch you a new outfit, I think we have some in the back."

"Thanks, I uh...I take a large," Carla blushed.

Allyson slipped out of the store room and went to the wardrobe beside Sarah's office. She had never had cause to enter it before, but as she pulled it open, she was surprised by how much was in there. Interestingly, there seemed to be a uniform for each girl in every possible size. Weird, they must be covering for all sizes and shapes in case they hire anyone else.

Allyson grabbed a large skirt in Carla's colour and returned to the store room, where she was greeted by the sight of Carla's huge rump sticking in the air as the curvy girl struggled to pick up a box of candy she had just knocked over. With cheeks bulging, she turned around and blushed at Ally's return, then smiled when she saw the replacement skirt.

"Uh, thanks Ally, I owe you one," Carla said. "Um...don't tell anyone about this, okay?"

"Sure," Allyson said. "Wasn't planning to."

"Thanks," Carla said, pulling the skirt up her chunky thighs with some difficulty, before zipping it up and heading back out of the store room without another word.

"Well, that was awkward," Allyson said to herself, laughing as the door swung shut behind Carla's swaying behind.
1212112211111222.title: Carla's ripping skirt

choices: On her way home, Allyson is approached by someone who gives her a warning...
Tara's shirt pops open...
One month later, Allyson has gained an alarming 50 pounds...
12121122111112222.content:
The rest of the week carried on much the same for Allyson. She repeated her ongoing pattern of work, eat, sleep as she had been doing. As the week went on, she began to grow more and more aware of the fact that she seemed to be having trouble with her uniform; it was logical that the volume of candy she was consuming was causing her to gain weight, and yet still, despite knowing full well she should cut down and eat healthily for a while, she could not bring herself to stop. If anything, her candy intake only seemed to increase as the days went on.

She found herself increasingly tired and unmotivated at the end of each day. She would tell herself she would go home and do something productive, like look at travel plans for next year or future job prospects, but by the time she got back to the apartment, all she wanted to do was chill out. Allyson was self aware enough to realise this was becoming a problem, but her motivation to actually do something about it wasn't high at the moment.

As she got ready for work on Friday morning, she found herself having to make a number of adjustments to her shirt. The buttons seemed tighter across her softer tummy, and slight gaps were beginning to show. She had to keep tugging it down, smoothing it out and even had to suck in slightly to get some of the buttons done up.

Her skirt constricted her waist and emphasised her slightly expanded rear end, while her thighs, for the first time in her life, seemed to be losing their thigh gap. Allyson was a little concerned by these changes, however subtle they were right now. She had always been slender and in shape, but now, for the first time, she was becoming a little curvy. It wasn't as noticeable when she wasn't wearing her work outfit, but she could definitely feel the added pounds starting to stack up.

Buttoning up her blazer, she headed to work, her newly formed belly jiggling slightly as she walked...

---

As she got to work, she noticed, not for the first time this week, that the other girls seemed to be having similar issues. Carla's butt seemed to be ever increasing, and over the past few days, Allyson had noticed her stomach seemed to be permanently bloated. Tara, on the other hand, looked like she was having more trouble with her chest; her shirt was pulled even tighter across her breasts now, and Allyson could clearly see the lacey cups of her light blue bra between the gaps created by her cleavage. Her belly had not escaped the damage either, her formerly svelte, toned abs now had a bulge that matched Allyson's own, though Tara's seemed a little bigger.

Nobody can stop eating this stuff. If we carry on this way, we're all going to end up gaining the candy store fifteen by the time the month is over...

And yet, despite, her growing awareness, Allyson couldn't help but snack throughout the day, ferreting chocolates into her mouth behind the cash register every time the customers weren't looking...
12121122111112222.title: Tightening uniforms

choices: Intrigued, Allyson looks into the company further...
Allyson devours this week's candy later that night, leaving her craving more...
121211221111122221.content:
Lamenting the fact that, once again, she was leaving work with a belly full of candy, Allyson said her goodbyes to the others and started her walk home, her free weekly bag of candy under her arm. Allyson told herself that at least she was still getting exercise via her daily walks to and from work; they at least got her about 5000 steps in, although that didn't really seem enough to burn off all those chocolate calories. Walking also drew more attention to her recent weight gain, as her skirt and shirt chafed uncomfortably with each step. She hadn't worn her running gear for a while, and she dreaded to think how constricting that would be now...

As she rounded a corner, she saw a girl in a zip up hoodie, baseball cap and sunglasses, looking rather inconspicuous next to a lamppost. She gave her a quick side eye, wondering why she was wearing shades in the early evening in the middle of Autumn, but then dismissed her and carried on walking. But as she went on, she couldn't shake the feeling someone was behind her. Footsteps grew closer, and she suddenly felt a hand gently grab her arm. "H-hey, what are you-"

Allyson found herself, perhaps not unsurprisingly, face to face with sunglasses-girl. The girl quickly released her arm. "Sorry, didn't mean to startle you."

"Then maybe you shouldn't have grabbed me," Allyson said, pulling her arm back. "Do I know you?"

The girl lowered her glasses, revealing a pair of green eyes. Her hair was tied into a ponytail emerging form the whole at the back of the baseball cap. "You work at the candy store, right?"

"Uh...yeah," Allyson replied. She wondered whether this was an addicted customer wanting free samples or discounts, or even hoping that she had some candy on her. People did seem to be getting rather desperate for it lately. "We're closed now though-"

13.content:
Lana walked underneath the huge, multicoloured gates of the new Expansive Candy Factory; the company's logo towering above her in huge, garish, metallic lettering. Geez, even the sign is giving me diabetes, she thought. When she first saw the job advertised, Lana had thought it a very easy way to make some money; she had been out of work for a while now, since the restaurant she used to waitress at had closed down.

Lana wasn't really a fan of hard work; she wasn't lazy, exactly, but she liked jobs where she could relax, take her time and not have to stress about deadlines. So "taste tester" was pretty much a perfect way for her to chill out and earn good money for just eating candy every day. The job was on a two weeks trial basis to start with; and she imagined it probably wouldn't continued much longer than that, because hey, there's only so much candy in the world.

It was pretty cold out, and some snow had landed on the ground as she approached the main entrance. She pulled her jacket tighter across her chest as a cold wind hit her. Lana was wearing a leather jacket and green, flannel shirt with hip hugging jeans. Her time in unemployment had, she was aware, added some extra pounds to her once slender frame, and her once flat stomach had expanded slightly, gaining some added pudge. She was still getting used to the fact that her clothes were a little tight, but hey, at least they weren't making her wear a uniform for this. She ran a hand through her short, pink hair and stepped inside.

The reception staff welcomed her politely, perhaps a little too politely. Must be all that sugar.

They led her down a corridor away from the offices and to the main factory, where she was greeted by a short girl in a bright pink shirt and striped, white and red skirt. Lana was nearly blinded by the garishness of her outfit.

"Hiiiiii!" The girl waved enthusiastically. "I'm Tammy. You must be Lana. Oh my God, I love your hair!"

"Thanks," Lana said. "Matches your outfit."

Tammy laughed a high pitched laugh and linked her arm through Lana's, before leading her off through a large set of double doors. Lana found herself being ushered into a huge, open environment, which to her shock, resembled a large, indoor park, complete with trees, bushes and a flowing river. "Wow, this is like...some sort of indoor garden?"

"Yep," Tammy said, still dragging Lana forward. "We're still adding the finishing touches though."

As they walked past the river, Lana could have sworn the water was brown and gooey, but she had little time to dwell on that before Tammy ushered her through another set of doors and into a very clean, sparkling white room with a table and chairs.

"This is the testing room," Tammy said. Her attention suddenly went to the table, and she raised an eyebrow.

Lana followed her gaze and saw a small lump of what seemed to be marshmellow on the other immaculate table surface. "Am I meant to eat that?" She laughed.

Tammy laughed awkwardly. "Sorry...this was meant to be cleaned up after the last girl...erm...anyway, just ignore that. Welcome to your first day! You got the induction pack, right?"

Lana shrugged. "I glanced at it, I think..." She had not, in fact, glanced at it at all. It was still lying unopened on her kitchen counter.

"GREAT!" Tammy enthused. "We can probably get started then. We'll just be trialling a few of our new candies today. These haven't been tasted by anyone yet, so you're very lucky."

Lana unzipped her jacket, feeling her belly bulge out slightly as she was allowed some room to breathe. She had become very aware of her extra weight, and had found herself sucking in whenever she was around people. For now though, she just quickly took a seat at the table and folded her arms. "Ready to start when you are," she said.

131.content:
Tammy went to get the samples while a cleaning person came and scraped the marshmallow substance of the table. She gave Lana a strange look, first like she was questioning why she was there, and then with an obvious glance at her stomach like it all made perfect sense. Jeez, I'm not huge or anything, Lana thought, and tugged on her shirt a little.

Tammy returned, bright eyed and exuberant as before, with an encased cart and a clipboard with with a thick set of papers in there. They were grading sheets for the candles, complete with spaces to further elaborate on each criteria. Fortunately it looked self-explanatory; outside texture, interior texture, consistency, taste, aftertaste, smell, etc. They were all graded on a ten point scale.

"Since you read your packet you should have no problem filling these out," Tammy handed Lana the clipboard.

"Heh, yeah, no problem at all." She saw a weird entry at the bottom. "Side effects?"

Tammy giggled wildly, "Oh, you know, just in case. It's why we need a tester after all. When you applied you said you didn't have any allergies, is that right?"

"Only sugar."

Tammy looked shocked, and then burst out laughing much more than Lana's joke warranted. Shaking her head, Tammy pushed a button on the cart, causing the lid to slide open with a hiss. There were a dozen rectangular chocolate bars inside, all perfectly ordinary looking. Tammy sniffed. From the scent alone she could tell they were high quality.

"Very rich," Tammy said. She saw the samples marked A, B, C, and so on. "So should I fill out everything?"

"Everything you can think of! We need all the data we can to make the perfect candy. Today we're testing a new marshmallow chocolate bar. We use only the purest ingredients and each recipe here is slightly different."

"Okay, I guess I'll start then..."

"Eat slowly now, take it all in. Plus, you don't want to get full too fast or it's going to be a really long day," Tammy's head bobbed with excitement. Lana gave her an odd look. This woman either loved her job so much it was creepy or she was eating way too much of the candy.

The job wasn't quite as simple as Lana imagined, but it was also nowhere near as complicated as the long, detailed forms made it out to be. At first she tried being perfectly precise with her grading and descriptions. Tammy looked pleased with that, noting on her own clipboard.

While not exciting work, Tammy was starting to get into it a little. Two candy bars in she started thinking she was like some kind of low level candy tasting expert. Like those wine aficionados, but with candy. They took a break at once point, and Lana went to the cafeteria to get some lunch while Tammy went off on her own. She was feeling full from the candy but knew she should eat some real food. Being out of work for a few months had already taken a greater toll on her figure than she liked, if she wasn't careful this job would do worse.

After lunch, it was more of the same. It wasn't a job Tammy would want to do forever, but it beat office work and paid better than most, too. Plus, the candy was all so good. Even if she was eating slight variations of the same marshmallow chocolate bar today, she didn't get tired of it. It was all good without being so rich it was sickening. She could appreciate this gourmet candy. Lana didn't appreciate, however, how by the end of the day she could no longer suck her little tummy in. If it oozed out over hear jeans and tightened her shirt the way it did whenever she sat down or forgot to suck in.

"We can call it a day," Tammy said. She hadn't lost her excited attitude the entire day. "How are you liking the work so far?" Tammy walked with Lana as she left the building.

"I think I'm going to like it. I never had gourmet candy like this before. Except now I feel like my stomach is stuffed with marshmallows,"

Tammy looked concerned. "What? It does? Does it feel like, um, like anything is moving? Or growing?"

"Uh, no, I'm just full," Lana gave her stomach a pat. It still jiggled a little but was full. If she still had her flat stomach the food baby would be obvious.

Tammy breathed a sigh of relief. "Oh, haha, of course!" And then, she gave Lana's tummy a pat. Lana blushed, her stomach groaned in response. Tammy looked embarrassed herself. Lana very nearly slapped Tammy away. Her gain, especially that belly bulge, was a sore spot for her and she got enough teasing about it from her roommate as it was. But Tammy probably didn't mean anything by it. When she gave Lana a crushing hug as she said bye, Tammy chalked it up to Tammy being an overly-friendly, overly-enthusiastic person.

-----------

Lana couldn't wait to get home and relax. Her job was easy but it still left her tired. Rachel was making herself dinner, a typically healthy meal. Lana used to eat that nice, healthy food herself before she lost her job. She could no longer afford to pitch in and would up, for the first time in her life, consisting mostly on junk food. She used to look like Rachel, slim and petite and perfectly trim. Now her hips had an obvious flair, her butt was noticeably wider, and of course her stomach pooched out. Lana was right on the verge of outgrowing most of her clothes. Her loose clothing she liked now fit her like it was meant to be form fitting.

"How's work at the candy factory?" Rachel asked.

"Boring but delicious. But it'll pay the bills."

"Thank god for that," Rachel flashed Lana a pleased look, a welcome change from the critical stares she'd been getting from her roommate lately. "I'm making dinner, you want some?"

Normally that would be a strong yes, except Lana was still stuffed from eating candy all day. Still, Rachel's fine healthy cooking would-and should-be the way Lana could cap off a day of eating.

Lana looked at the unlocked door as a sign of opportunity. "Hmm...well...I do work here now and...I say I'm due for my perks." Lana said as she scooted herself out of her seat and went through the door. "Whoa...now this is nice."

Having gone past the door, she looked down a vast hallway with numerous doors that seemed to be endless. For Lana, this seemed like a dream come true as she Since she was a little girl, Lana had always been a fan of movies like Willy Wonka or Charlie and the Chocolate factory. She wanted to find herself thrusted into a world where the impossible becomes possible.

"Okay...let's make sure this visit is done right." Lana said. "Eeny, meeny, miney...mo!" she said pointing to a door marked...
133.title: A Kid in a Candy Factory

choices: Claire opens an email from someone offering her information on the factory...
Claire decides to check out the factory for herself later that night...
Claire tries to get an interview with Elena...
14.content:
"It's a dam Candy factory, Claire! You really think people are going to be interested in that?"

"It's huge news, chief!"

Claire, hands on hips, stood before the oversized desk of the Spring Gazette's editor, Mr Stone, a heavy set man with a huge, bushy moustache and what seemed to be an ever present frown. They were currently locked in a stare-down, with Claire's piercing, blue eyes fixed on Stone's own, twitching pupils. Stone seemed to be losing concentration, as he always did. He claimed it was because he was always too busy to get into an argument, but Claire knew the old guy had a soft spot for her.

"Fine!" Stone said, his face reddening. "Cover the dam factory story. What's so interesting about it anyway?"

"It practically sprung up over night," Claire explained, relaxing her posture. "That company has bought up property all over town. They seem to be banking on everything being a huge success, because there's stores opening everywhere. There's already six. We're a tiny town, why do they need all those stores?"

Stone shrugged. "Does seem a bit excessive, but people do like candy..."

"Do they really like candy this much though?" Claire asked.

"What am I? An expert?!" Stone snapped irritably. "You are sure there's nothing more interesting you could be covering?"

Claire sighed. "Chief, in the past week, the only other story you found me was one about a dog wearing a hat."

"People like that dog, Claire."

"Yes, chief, we all like the dog," Claire allowed herself a smile. "But it wasn't exactly newsworthy."

Stone sighed. "Yeah, yeah, I know, it's a small town and a slow news week...month...year..." He cleared his throat. "I know you feel like you're wasted here. Truth is, you are. You can do better, and I appreciate you staying on...for now. Okay Claire, see what you can find on. Who knows? Maybe the Spring Falls candy mystery will be front page news this time tomorrow."

"Thanks Chief!" Claire grinned. She turned to walk from the office, but Stone cleared his throat, causing her to turn back to face him. "What?"

"Don't cause any trouble," Stone said, wagging his finger. "I know what you're like. You're an instigator."

Claire smiled mischievously and adopted an innocent look. "Who? Me?" Stone chuckled as Claire ducked out of his office and into the corridor.

She was pleased she had been allowed to do the story, she was certain there was something here. That factory and the oddly successful company behind it gave her a bad feeling. On looking into their past, she had found that the company had been founded twenty years ago as a small time candy shop in New York. They were moderately successful, but hardly in the big leagues. After the founder passed away, his daughter, Elena, had taken over, and at that point, she had somehow managed to turn around the company's fortunes. The shop in New York had been closed abruptly and the company had undergone a huge renovation and restructure.

Claire found it all very suspicious. Samples of the free candy had been sent to some select people in town, but apart from that, it was still not available for public consumption; that was, until tomorrow when the stores had their grand opening. It seemed like a hugely risky gamble to take; what if people didn't like the candy? Was this Elena so convinced of her business acumen and the quality of her product, that she was sure her new venture would be a success?

Claire returned to her desk and sat down, eager to get started. She hadn't mentioned it to Stone, but she already had a few leads...
14.title: Claire

choices: Megan begins to make hissing sounds from his throat
Actually, she's fine, that was until she ate some mentos
141.content:
Megan walked into through the factory's door with open enthusiasm, which quickly slowed as Megan looked around. There wasn't a lively attitude in the factory. No sounds of hustle and bustle or even the creaking movement of workers.Near dead silence. Megan turned to look at the front,a large desk greeted her.With some reluctance, Megan moved closer. On the desk was a single button, the words under it read "press for assistance" in bright yellow letters.

Megan did as the words told, quickly pressing down onto the single button.

"Hello madam." A voice spoke. Megan jumped in shock, she looked forward to see a woman causally sitting on a chair. An unfamiliar phone was held in her hand, the woman looking down at it.

"Um. Hello to you to." was Megan's only response. "Got. I got a job here, this pager I got on me is buzzing."

"Oh. So you're our mechanic! I apolgize for not recognizing you, my name is Cheryl." The receptionist replied. Megan's nerves were calming as human interaction came into play. The two shook hands before Cheryl got up and asked Megan to follow her. The mechanic nodded and followed Cheryl deeper into the facility. Megan's eyes glanced at the various fruits on the wall,it made the factory look somewhat childish.

"You have kids here?" Megan joked. "They like all of this?"

Cheryl glanced back at Megan.

"What are yo- oh, the wallpaper, sorry bout that, yeah you can say people enjoy them."

Megan swore she heard a small "slurp" from Cheryl's mouth but ignored it. The sound of darting feet caused her to briefly turn around, a small shadow passed behind her,which made Megan jump.

"Something the matter?"

"Oh, its nothing." Megan replied. She didn't dare say she saw a tiny shadow run behind her. That wasn't what professionals said to their employers.Finally the two arrived into the cafeteria, which like the rest of the factory,looked empty. Cheryl pointed forward, Megan could see a powered down fountain dispensers like what most restaurants used. Except this one was the twice the size of a normal one.

"It isn't lunchtime yet." Cheryl explained. "You have about two hours to fix the machine or at least tell us the problem.Don't worry, we'll compensate you for an entire day's work even if you don't fix it."

Megan nodded walking up to the large dispenser. She took out her tools,and with a quick stretch, looked inside the soda fountain.Thirteen minutes later, Megan was slowly unhooking a tube, her hand gently loosen its cap.Upon loosening the tube a hum came from inside the machine and Megan only hand time to say "what" before a blast of soda smashed against her face. It only lasted for a minute but it left Megan stumbling out of the fountain.

"Gah." Megan screamed, she spurted soda from her mouth. "This is gonna ruin my hair! Sticky son of a..."

Megan stopped her rant as she touched her face, she didn't feel the stickiness of a corn-starch product like she'd usually did. It was like water, but the sweetness still could be tasted on her mouth.
141.title: Issues with the Soda Fountain

choices: Megan grows out of her clothes
Megan is brought away by small little orange ladies
Megan tries to see if Cheryl can help
1412.content:
"Megan? Are you all right? Do you need medical attention?" Cheryl called. Megan looked over to the archway seeing the receptionist walk right over to her. Megan waved her off,she touched her face for a bit. She licked her lips as she tasted the flavorful drink that she had been splashed with.

"I don't mean to pry,but what's with your soda?" She questioned. Cheryl smiled.

"We've been working on a new formula that doesn't stick to surfaces. Our employees get to taste it before it hits the markets." She pointed over to the fountain. "Its been real popular,both because of its lack of stickiness and in flavor."

Megan licked her lips once more.

"Yeah,its like I've been splashed with water. It won't stain my clothes?"

"Not at all.We pride ourselves on this new formula,its big selling point is being smooth in the throats of drinkers!"

Megan smiled and went over to a stack of paper towels. She wiped herself down making sure she was somewhat dry. Cheryl looked at Megan for a few more moments before she took off.The mechanical savvy lass finished her drying,she went back to the machine and restarted where she left off.

After thirty minutes, Megan saw nothing else to repair or check up on. She walked away to grab a hold of a Styrofoam cup. Holding the white cup in her hand, Megan went back over to see if everything checked out. A trickle of cola came foaming out which meant Megan had done her job right. Though she did frown as the soda only made up a quarter of the cup's volume.

"I gotta ask if they want me to refill the fountain as well?" Megan mused. She gulped down whatever contents that was in the cup and sat down on one of the cafeteria's seats. From her pocket she pulled out a wrapped cylinder of delicious minty mentos. She popped one into her mouth. She chewed on the snack for a few moments until she swallowed it whole,she never liked mashing mentos until they were easily digestible. Many did warn her that she could choke,but hey, it never happened before.

A rumble came from her stomach and Megan clenched herself in discomfort.

"Ooooh. That doesn't sound good."

A burp erupted from her throat,the mechanic blushed. The weird rumbles in her gut didn't stop,the pressure felt like it was building up inside of her. Another burp gave some much needed release but they happened every so often and not enough to stop her building pressure.

More gastric noises came from within,Megan lifted her arms away from herself. She yelped in shock at what had happened to her once trim stomach.She was about to dismiss this as a bad case of gas, if not for the fact she could see her stomach continue its growth.

More burps came from her mouth and Megan clenched her jaws to quell it. That was a terrible mistake though, her growth kick started. Her once slim ass and small tits blew up almost immediately in response. They stretched her clothes and pushed against her overalls. Megan opened her mouth to release a loud burp to curb the growth,which it did, to a small margin.

There on the seat Megan sat, her body inflating without anyone to help her.

142.content:
Claire was intending to work for a high profile newspaper in a big city, so she worked to dig up some kind of dirt and managed to find out about a hole in the fence of the Expensive Factory near the back and close to where they supposedly made their product. This was told to her by one of male janitors, Ted or something like that. Naturally, to see if something illegal was going on or perhaps getting a scoop on something just as juicy. Her body she trained hard during her high school days and doing this job will aid her way in getting in.

She waited until night, and under the cover of darkness and dim lights she sneaked towards the supposed hole in the fence. She made sure to wear black jeans, a black hoodie, and as well as a equally black long sleeve shirt just so she wouldn’t be discovered easily. The factory seemed like any other factory from the outside but she had the wonder what the inside as well as the staff was like inside the brick and metal buildings.

“Man this is easy. Actually it is way too easy it's scary.” Claire thinks as she gets close to the man sized hole just barely big enough to fit the redhead through. “Seriously is it because this opened recently and don’t have the manpower or is security just lazy because this is a candy factory?”

The thought of either is nice but if Claire has learned one thing as a journalist it’s that not everything is as it seems. With a few curses at her clothing getting caught on the fence and a minute of gentle pulling Claire manages to get fully inside the factory taking several looks around to make sure the coast is clear as well as making sure that Janitor’s info was right. There was several other hallways leading away....perhaps she could find something more....tangible and physical then running away with a few pictures just in case?

“Damn that guy was right…” Claire’s blue eyes as if she had just won the jackpot as she sees the words ‘Assembly and Testing’ in bold letters. Moving her fit body forward Claire-
142.title: Nightly Investigation!

choices: Go to the testing room...
Go the see the taste testers...
Go to see the mixing vats...
Go the assembly room...
1421.content:
"Nothing ventured, nothing gained," Claire thought, as she eyed up the 'Assembly and Testing' sign overhead. She cast a furtive glance down the corridor, then back over her shoulder, checking the coast was clear before she darted ahead and pushed open the door. She was half expecting it to be locked, but apparently security around here was pretty lax, so she was able to easily pushed on ahead. There were signs on the wall which read:

- Testing Room
- Assembly
- Taste Testers
- Mixing Vats


As she read the sign, she heard some faint footsteps in the distance, and the sound of male voices. Quickly, she looked for cover, and saw a large stack of metal containers in an alcove to her left. As the footsteps drew closer, Claire ducked behind the containers, crouching behind the largest of them and peeking over the top.

"Yeah, I don't know why we're not allowed free candy either, but whatever, it pays well," the first voice said.

"You're telling me, I could put my kids through college with my first three paychecks...not that I actually have kids," a second voice replied.

As they grew closer, Claire could see they were security guards, dressed in garish, dark purple uniforms. They stopped for a moment just the other side of the containers, and she ducked down again.

"You clocking off now?" The first guard asked.

"Yeah, our shifts over," replied the second man. "Do we have to do a handover or anything?"

"Nah, don't worry, the night shift will already be here," the first said.

"Oh yeah...the night shift...they give me the creeps..."

"I know what you mean, they always seem so..."

"Cheerful?"

"Creepy."

"That too."

The guards turned and walked on, passing through the doors and out of Claire's line of vision. She breathed a sigh of relief as she emerged from her hiding place. She wondered what they had meant by the "creepy night shift". Surely security guards should be the night shift, but maybe there was more security on the way? In which case, she would need to be careful. She cast a glance back up at the sign and decided on her next move...
1421.title: Assembly and Testing

choices: Claire can't help but sample some candies as she searches...
Claire hears voices approaching her...
A craving for the chocolate from earlier begins to plague Claire...
14211.content:
If there's anything to learn about the stuff this place is churning out, the Testing Room is bound to have it!

Goal in mind, Claire crept towards the Testing Room doors, glancing around as she moved. She hadn't a clue what would make the Night Shift so creepy, and she didn't really want to find out.

Oh, damn...

Cracking one of the heavy double doors open an inch, Claire couldn't help but gasp as she got a look at the Testing Room. The word 'Room', however, was a bit of an understatement. From where she was, she couldn't see the ceiling above her, not the wall opposite her. All she could make out was a metal catwalk just in front of her.

This place is massive! Claire pushed her way into the room, the door slamming shut behind her. I don't even know where to start! Uh... I guess right is as good a place as any...

Moving to her right, Claire tip-toed across the catwalk, pausing occasionally to glance over the railing. Various machines and tables decorated with papers and candies stored in airtight containers met her gaze, each one more enticing than the last. Eventually, she came across a staircase that she wasted no time in bouncing down.

First table! Let's see what you're hiding...

The first table, unfortunately, wasn't all that interesting. A neat plaque in the corner of the table told her that the candy on the table was nothing more than simple chocolate. Even so, she took a moment to open one of the containers and pluck out a few pieces of said chocolate.

"Looks normal, feels normal... Tastes normal?" Claire mumbled to herself, rolling a bit between her fingers. With a shrug, she plopped it into her mouth. Almost immediately, it melted atop her tongue, spreading its rich taste throughout her mouth. With a happy moan, she devoured the rest of her stolen pieces, licking her fingers clean once done. "Never mind, tastes absolutely delicious! A bit more wouldn't... No, hold it, Claire! You can't afford to get stopped at the first table!"

And so, with surprising will, she tore herself away from the chocolate and began to wander through the massive room. Each table she came across had a plaque stamped to it, indicating the name of the candy stored atop it. Some were self-explanatory, like the 'Toffee Chewers', while others were slightly more obscure, such as the 'Bootilicious Bites' and the 'Plump Suckers'.

"So many candies!" Claire exclaimed as she finally came to the end of the first row. She must've passed at least fifteen tables, and there were easily another five or six rows! "Well, I guess I've got a good but of searching before I get any answers..."
14211.title: The Testing Room

choices: The unstable chocolate is causing Claire to gain weight rapidly...
The chocolate causes Claire to be permanently hungry...
An alarm suddenly goes off...
142113.content:
Claire moved on to the next table, where there were a series of test tubes on a rack containing some sort of green liquid; Claire couldn't figure out what it was, and there didn't seem to be any labels on any of the equipment. She pulled out her phone and snapped a few pictures of the room, then a close up of the test tubes. She hadn't exactly found anything interesting yet, but thought it best to take a few photos, just in case, and she wasn't entirely sure she would be able to come back the same way she had come in.

Pocketing her phone into her black hoodie, she took a closer look at the tubes, before noticing one of the desk drawers under the table was slightly ajar. Jackpot. Pulling open the drawer, Claire was confronted with a clipboard containing some hand written notes and a results chart. She laid the notes out across the desk and started reading. The first set of notes read:

Day 1 - New Chocolate Testing

Results so far have been unpredictable. While we have been able to replicate the same taste as previous chocolate products and, indeed, improved upon it, we have struggled to contain the expansive effect of the new recipe. We do not recommend going to human testing at this stage.

Claire froze as she read the words "we do not recommend human testing". She scanned the page again, hoping she had misread, but her eyes had not deceived her. The chocolate appeared, from these notes, to be unsafe for human consumption. The chocolate she had, stupidly, just eaten. But surely it was only chocolate? What could they possibly be putting into it that would make it dangerous?

Before she went any further, she took her camera out again and photographed the notes and chart. She wanted to make sure she had record of everything after what she had just read. God, I could really go for some more of that chocolate...

Claire had to stop herself from turning back, but the intrusive thoughts about that chocolate kept coming back to her. She could still taste it on her tongue, which darted between her teeth looking for leftover fragments. But it wasn't safe! She had literally just read that. It would have been stupid to try some more. Claire resolved to check the rest of the room and then move on.

She moved to the next work station, her head now filled with paranoid thoughts about what was going to happen to her after eating that chocolate. That rich...delicious...chocolate...

Claire suddenly turned and darted back to the table. She needed more. She had to have more.

Unable to control herself, she grabbed a handful of the chocolate pieces on the table and started munching down on them, grabbing one after the other and devouring whatever she could get her hands on...
142113.title: Cravings

choices: Claire searches for more notes, determined to discover the truth...
Her cravings return, and Claire begins to gorge herself again...
A door slamming causes Claire to panic and hide...
1421131.content:
"M-Mmph... More... More!"

Polishing off the bits and pieces that were scattered across the table top, Claire's arms shot out, grabbing a sealed container of the chocolate and pulling it towards her. Tearing the top from the box, her hands hungrily dug in, scooping out handfuls of the rich treat and stuffing them into her mouth. After a few particularly large and particularly delicious chocolates had been swallowed, she managed to tear herself away from the table, breathing heavily.

"U-Urgh... So many..."

Claire groaned heavily, stifling a chocolate scented belch with the palm of her hand. Doing so, however, brought the scent of the heavenly treat to her nose and she found herself racing back to the table to scoop up another couple of bites. This time, she found she couldn't stop, nor did she particularly want to. All she did want to do was eat... and eat... and eat... and -

*PING*

Claire came to a sudden halt, slightly melted chocolate held aloft in both hands, as she heard something other than the sounds of her stuffing her face. The world around her gradually came back into focus, bringing with an unusual weight to her body.

"God, I feel so heavy!" She moaned quietly, licking her hands clean of any remaining melted chocolate. "Surely I didn't eat that much!"

Glancing down, it was painfully obvious that Claire had eaten that much. In fact, her trim body, toned after many years of her visiting the gym on daily basis, now looked as though she had fed it 'that much' every single day for the past several years.

Startled into a stunned silence, her hands first gripped her hefty belly, which had swollen out into two round, wobbling rolls that neither her sweater or her hoodie could completely cover. Pinching the lower roll, which hung down over the waistband of her jeans, one hand travelled downwards, discovering that the sound from earlier had been the button on her jeans flying off and colliding with something, presumably the table in front of her. Said jeans were now stretched tightly over her lower body, particularly her much rounder backside.

While her left hand explored her new, corpulent lower half, her right was discovering her much softer and much less firm chest. She had never been particularly blessed when it came to her breasts, not that being average had ever bothered her. But now, her average breasts had ballooned into two orbs of soft flab that, from what she could feel, were overfilling the cups of her bra. Each one had to have doubled in size, almost equalling the size of her own head.

"W-What happened to me?!" Claire managed to finally stammer, her newly formed second chin wobbling slightly as she spoke. "W-Was this what the notes meant when they said the chocolate weren't ready for human testing? There's gotta be more notes..."
1421131.title: Fit to Fat

choices: Claire decides to look for the recovery room and find the test subject...
Claire can't resist eating more of the chocolate, causing further growth...
Claire decides to leave immediately and look for medical help...
14211311.content:
There must be way to undo this! There must be more notes somewhere!

Claire began searching the nearby desks frantically, pulling open drawers and rooting through them desperately. If the company had notes about this highly unpredictable new product, they must have tested it, and if they had tested it, then surely there must be some way to reverse it's effects? There would have been a huge lawsuit against the company if a taste tester had suddenly suffered these side effects. Claire hoped that was the case, anyway...it was also very possible that some poor taste tester had just been left to balloon out of control and was then quietly paid off.

Somehow, though, Claire didn't think a journalist who had broken in in the dead of night and eaten samples of a new product would receive a nice payout. As she rooted around, she felt her stomach gurgle ominously, and ran a hand over her bulging belly. Deciding she needed some insurance, she pulled out her phone and started recording a video. She was immediately struck by how much fuller her face seemed; her once angular features now rounder and softer.

"This is Claire Williams, reporting from the Expansive Candy factory. I entered the factory earlier this evening and have discovered some...strange new product...some sort of chocolate which has caused me to experience strange side effects." She moved the camera over her body to show how tight her outfit had grown, then stopped recording.

Returning to her search, Claire picked up a brown file from the nearest desk and opened it up to find another set of notes.

"Test Subject 1: Lana

Subject found new chocolate to be very tasty, said it was her favourite so far. All seemed to be going well until her cravings became difficult to control. We would naturally expect cravings to set in after a day or so, but not within the first few seconds after consumption.

As subject tried to satisfy their cravings, they appeared to ease off and then return at regular intervals. Rapid weight gain ensued as she consumed more and more chocolate and the effects of the chocolate caused a more enhanced cell multiplication than we are used to. Subject eventually tired self out and was transferred to the recovery room while we work on bodily restoration.

Would not recommend we test product again until modification have been made to the recipe."

"No, no, no..." Claire felt sick. If this poor girl doing the testing had had such an extreme reaction so quickly...was the same thing going to happen to her? Had she eaten enough chocolate to trigger the same kind of reaction? She was already swelling up...
14211311.title: Weird science

choices: Lana, fast asleep and twice her size
Someone completely different
A completely empty room
142113111.content:
"Wait a minute." she said realized as her pudgy face lit right up. "If this girl ate the chocolate and became like me, she must know more about it than I do. She could be my proof for exposing this negligent product. Okay...first things first, gotta find the Recovery Room." she said as she headed out of the Testing Room.

She headed down the hall as she looked around for any sign of the Recovery room. She continued navigating the halls of the surprisingly large factory before coming across a door with a red plus on it. "This has to be it." she said going into the room. It was completely white with a few strange machines set up that seemed alien to her.

She then noticed a few nurse uniforms set up. Finding one close to her current size, she snatched it as she slipped into a nearby restroom. She came out a few moments later in the snug looking outfit with her regular clothes hidden in the trash. She checked the file before arriving at Lana's supposed recovery room. "Knock knock...anybody up?" she said opening the door and seeing...
142113111.title: Looking for an Ally

choices: Claire remains to clean up her mess...
Claire gets the hell out of there!
While deciding, a hand grips Claire's shoulder...
142113112.content:
Glancing anxiously down at her flabby gut, Claire shuffled from foot to foot. She had been faced with her fair share of weird situations, such as that time she had ended up as a part of a major showing of some play, rather than the one reporting on it. But this, without any doubt in her mind, had to be the most outlandish one ever.

I can't continue sneaking around, not at my size, Claire was forced to admit. I need to leave, maybe check in at a... Urgh...

Claire's belly grumbled loudly, a sudden craving for more chocolate gripping her. Try as she might, she found herself unable to resist it, the memory of its rich taste lingering on her tongue. With heavy, lumbering footsteps, Claire returned to the chocolate, a sliver of drool running from the corner of her mouth. Lifting a bit, she dropped it into her mouth...

=====


Claire groaned as she slowly sat up, a hand running the back of her head. She hadn't a clue when it had happened, but she was now sat on the floor, something incredibly soft spreading out beneath her. And there was a chilled breeze brushing against her belly, which she could've sworn was covered by her jumper. Well, mostly covered, anyway...

"Why's it so cold all of a... sudden..."

Glancing down, Claire received the answer to her question. Sitting between two thick legs was a bare, heavy, spherical gut that gurgled and churned quietly. And atop them, filling the majority of her vision, sat a pair of corpulent, flabby orbs, something digging tightly into their flesh.

"O-Oh, crap..." Claire sat still for a moment, mouth hanging open in silent shock. One of her hands cautiously probed her body, discovering that the growth wasn't just limited to her breasts and belly. A plump second chin had developed beneath her first, her toned arms had vanished beneath a healthy layer of pale fat, her backside was softer and wider than her chair back at the office... "God, I'm so heavy!"

With a heavy grunt, Claire hauled herself to her feet. Once she was finally standing, a number of worrying snaps caused her to blush a bright red. Suddenly, her breasts didn't feel so constricted, and whatever had been digging painfully into her hips was gone.

"That's not good," Claire mumbled to herself, scratching at her pudgy hips. "I should probably get outta here..."

Turning to leave, she paused as she caught sight of the table. Broken boxes and melted chocolate were strewn across the top of it, making it painfully obvious that somebody had been here. Despite what the chocolate had done to her, part of her wanted to stay and clean it up, destroying any evidence that she had been here. But in doing so, she might get caught! Or worse, lose herself to her ravenous desires her again...
142113112.title: Chocolate Induced Blackout

choices: Claire decided to investigate the company further while hiding at home...
Claire can't stop craving that sweet chocolate...
Claire isn't done growing yet...
1421131122.content:
I am not spending another second in this freaking hellscape!

Enough was enough. Claire couldn't stay here any longer; she would either be caught by security, the ominous "night shift" or, worse, be drawn back to the delicious chocolate supply and end up making things even worse. She could hardly believe what had happened to her since arriving. All she had wanted was a juicy story, but instead, she had gained about fifty pounds in a single night. She was trying to avoid thinking about her sudden, rapid weight gain, but the newfound jiggle of her bulging tummy made that difficult.

She gathered up what she could from the workstations, shoving the testing notes into her satchel for safe keeping. Even if her...condition...was permanent, which she was desperately hoping wasn't the case, she would at least have some sort of evidence of what was going on here.

Going back the way she came, Claire had to fight the urge to grab more chocolate...though truth be told, she couldn't actually see any left on the table now. Please don't say I ate the entire supply...fuck. She tugged awkwardly at her hoodie as she ran, her new flab bouncing up and down, her breasts heaving beneath her top. Her top kept riding up above her belly button, and she had to keep pulling it back down.

Rounding the corner, Claire quickly checked the coast was clear before darting back down the corridor and out of the door she had originally entered through, before disappearing into the night, glad to finally be away from the house of horrors that was Expansive Candy.

=====


Finally back at her apartment, Claire breathed a sigh of relief as she climbed the stairs to her floor, panting heavily. She usually ran about three times per week, and could have easily bounded up these stairs in a few seconds on a good day, but today she was just sluggish, bloated and slow. With a groan of discomfort, she reached her floor and hurriedly stepped into her apartment, slamming the door shut behind her.

Breathing heavily, and glad to finally be safe, she finally took stock of her situation and her body. She slowly lifted her hoodie up over her tummy, which bulged free with a wobble. Claire winced at the sight of her newfound pot belly, barely able to believe what she was seeing. 142113112232.content:
Claire weighed her options and decided she couldn't really face going outside right now. The thought of being recognised (though recognising her at this point would have been difficult) was terrifying, and she would have been humiliated if one of her friends or colleagues saw her like this. Rather than get back out there, she decided she would need to work remotely. Her work laptop was, luckily, with her at home, and she had access to all her files here, so her apartment would just need double as her office for a while.

Claire wasn't exactly sure how long "a while" would be. She was still hoping there would be some sort of miracle cure or treatment to reverse what had happened to her; surely the company had to be paying for something like that to get themselves out of legal troubles with their taste testers? She doubted, however, that they would be ponying up any money for her, a journalist who had broken in and, through her own foolishness, consumed her weight in unattended chocolate. She cursed herself for being so stupid, still not quite able to believe she was in this ridiculous situation.

Claire turned again to look at her increasingly pudgy body in the mirror. Her belly was huge now; during the last growth spurt it had grown even rounder, and was surprisingly solid, considering it was all fat. Her ass had ballooned considerably, sticking out behind her almost as far as her belly, while her huge breasts had clearly gotten far too big for any of her bras. Claire walked to her wardrobe, thighs rubbing together with each step, and started searching for something that she might be able to squeeze into. Her pants, shirts and skirts were completely out of the question now; each one was about half the size of her new body. Her underwear was equally useless, so she would have to go without it for now.

The only acceptable option was a pair of sweat pants she had bought in the wrong size a little while ago, and an oversized sweater that had belonged to her old boyfriend. With a sigh, she resigned herself to her new, less fashionable outfit, and pulled the sweat pants up her chunky legs. Even being a few sizes too big, they were a tight squeeze to get on, and Claire had to tug at them to get past her ballooning behind, but eventually, she succeeded.

Breathing a sigh of relief, she grabbed the sweater and pulled that on over her head. Once again, it was harder than she was expecting. Her thick arms were a tight squeeze in the sleeves, but it did, thankfully, allow her breasts some room to breathe as she gently pulled it down over her chunky torso. Annoyingly, it didn't quite cover her entire belly, leaving her soft, pale belly on display up to the belly button.

"Ugh...dammit...better than nothing though," she grumbled.

Claire took a look at her reflection again and tried to pull herself together. This isn't permanent. You can beat this. You can beat them.

Waddling from her room, Claire grabbed her laptop and decided to get to work, curling up on the couch and beginning to look for leads. She already had two; the names of the test subjects, and as the factory had only recruited locally, those girls would have to be living somewhere in town. Hopefully, they would want to talk...

Like, 'the expensive stuff every drink' kinda well. Kinda makes me wonder why I'm slaving away here, rather than just chomping candies for money!"

"No, I'm unemployed at the minute..." India replied, carefully avoiding Claire's gaze.

Claire wasn't fazed by this, not yet, at least. Whether she worked at the factory currently or not didn't really make much difference; it was information on what exactly had happened there that the journalist was interested in. "Oh..." she said, trailing off for a moment as she tried not to sound too curious. "Didn't work out at the factory?"

India shook her head before taking a sip of her drink. "Oh, it was only temporary."

"So, how was the exciting world of taste testing?" Claire asked with a smile.

"Oh, it was fine," India said, a hand dropping to the bulge of her stomach and rubbing it gently. "I'd had about all the candy I needed though, heh..."

"You didn't have any bad side effects or anything like that, did you?" Claire asked.

"Oh no...not at all..." India looked uncomfortable. "Anyway, I better go...I..."

As India rose from her seat, Claire panicked. She would normally have kept her composure, but the thought of losing her when she was so close to an answer sent her into crisis mode. "Wait, I...I know what goes on there..."

India froze, looking over Claire with more detail, taking in her chubby form with new awareness. "I...I don't know what you mean."

Claire leaned in closer, lowering her voice to as much of a whisper as she could over the loud music playing above their heads. "I'm a journalist, I was working on a story about the factory and managed to sneak in for a closer look, but..."

"You ate something," India said, knowingly.

Claire nodded, blushing slightly. "It was just chocolate but...I've gained about one hundred pounds in a single day. I've never been fat in my life and now..." Claire gestured to her bloated body.

India looked around suspiciously before leaning in closer. "You shouldn't have done that, even the taste testers were warned about the potential side effects," she said. "Although they didn't tell us it was going to have the effect it did...luckily they could change us back."

Claire's eyes lit up. "So there is a way to reverse this?!"

India nodded. "Yeah, but...it's only for the testers, I don't think they make that stuff available in their stores or anything. They just used it on us to keep us quiet, then paid us off. I shouldn't even be saying any of this...it's violating my NDA..."

"What is this stuff? How do I find it? I need to change back!" Claire asked desperately.

India shook her head. "I don't even know, but...we still have to take it every day. They didn't say how long for."

Claire's eyes widened. "India...do you...do you have some of this stuff? Could you give me some of your supply?"

"I guess I could give you a few..." India said.

The curvy girl reached into her handbag and pulled out a small packet of pills. She tore a strip off and handed it to Claire. "Here, just take one a day for a week. There's six there, so that should last you. I need the rest for now until my body changes back to normal and they only top up our supply once a month."

"Oh God, thank you, thank you so much," Claire said, shoving the strip of tablets into her pocket. She pulled out her business card and handed it to India. "Listen, take this, if there's anything else you can tell me, it would be really helpful. They shouldn't be doing this to people."

India nodded and pocketed the card. "Listen, I have to go...I've already said too much." She slipped her considerable booty off the stool and disappeared off into the crowd.

Claire breathed an immense sigh of relief and immediately turned and hurried back to her car, where she immediately opened up the tablets and swallowed her first one, hoping it would take effect sooner rather than later...
