142113112313.content:
Claire awoke. Jerking forward as her body suddenly roused itself from its slumber, she made to stand up, but immediately hit a snag in that plan. As she moved forward a sharp tug of resistance eminated from her wrists and ankles, tipping her off that for some reason she was restrained.

Opening her eyes, she winced as the bright lights of the room she was in made her pupils dilate as they struggled to adapt to their surroundings. Speaking of which, from the plush feeling on her back from what seemed like a dentist's chair whoever took her here must have wanted to ensure some level of comfort.

"Now to figure out where the hell I got taken..." Claire muttered to herself. The most she could recall was coming to the factory, breaking into the grounds, and then... "Chocolate, and lots of it..." she groaned. She never wanted to see another Hershey's in her life after this. Losing all the weight she'd gained from whatever ingredients this shady corporate front put in was going to be a-

Wait... she froze, looking downwards and noticing a distinct lack of belly and rolls of fat to accompany it. In fact, her arms looked skinnier, her thighs, everything on her body had the fat mysteriously melted off of it! Well except my boobs and I think my butt...my top and jeans are still kinda tight in those areas...

She at least thanked her past self for disposing of her bra. No amount of mortification was worth a bad chafe after all. "Was that all just a dream? If that's the case...where am I?" Claire voiced her thoughts aloud. Normally she wasn't in the habit of talking to herself, but the room was currently devoid of human life, with only the faint hum of machinery hugging the walls to keep her company.

"Excellent questions Claire." A voice spoke from behind her, making the girl in question jolt in her seat from being startled so suddenly. This reaction elicited a feminine giggle from the voice's owner, who decided to reveal themselves as they came from behind Claire and walked around her chair.

Claire narrowed her eyes as she instantly recognized them as the woman who had been brought to her before by the security guard. More importantly however, as Claire eyed the woman up and down, taking in her immaculate ebony suit and skirt combo, luscious brown hair, stark emerald eyes, and pristine appearance she realized she knew her from somewhere else.

"You're Elena Exco," Claire growled, realizing that one of the targets of her story was right in front of her, "you're the CEO of Expansive Candies after your father-"

"Passed away yes," Elena sighed wistfully, her eyes glassed over with a faint sadness as she nearly lost herself in memory lane, before blinking and bringing herself back to the present with an amused look. "I shouldn't be surprised that you've done your homework Ms. Patterson."

Claire paled as she realized that her identity wasn't exactly unknown. "G-Good, glad we know each other then..." she stammered out, trying to hold up the challenging stare she'd had before her name was spoken.

From Ms. Exco's confident smirk however, it seemed to be less than effective. Clair liked to think she was no pushover, but the woman radiated confidence and superiority somehow!

"Now Claire I understand that you've been...a greedy little glutton as of tonight haven't you?" The woman laughed airily as she poked the nose of her captive. "Now, normally I'd be inclined to let you go but...my sources say you were doing a bit of snooping for a rather interesting scoop no?"

"So what if I was?" Claire shot back, turning her nose up at the woman as best she could, "after what I've experienced so far your company's practices aren't exactly ethical."

"Perhaps not, though I hardly think it matters if no one finds out."

"Is that your plan then? Get rid of me and cover me up?" Claire snorted, trying to swallow down the faint sense of fear bubbling up within her. "You know people will notice I'm gone right? They'll come looking."

"Oh absolutely, just one headache after another you've been causing for us, naughty girl!" Surprisingly, rather than being angry at Claire, the CEO seemed unfazed, like a mother watching the antics of a small child as they unfolded. Holding up a few fingers, Elena began to list off the red-head's transgressions. "Breaking and entering, destruction of property, stolen product, and a hit piece in the works to name a few things!"

"Big deal, your company is booming because of whatever you do here, why do you care?"

"Well, to be frank, I don't." Elena snorted flatly, before adopting another winning smile. "We've got you indebted to us after all."

"How so?" Claire frowned. She didn't exaxtly recall owing this factort much except the cost of the chocolates she ate. Hell they might even owe her money since her camera and phone seemed to be missing at the moment!

"Well, I'd say getting rid of all that extra weight was a great kindness no?"

So it wasn't a dream... Claire gulped, realizing that each and every chocolate she'd stuffed herself with had been real. "How'd you manage that? Liposuction? What you gonna charge me for that too?"

"Oh ho noooo Claire nothing so rudimentary as that." Elena laughed, "I had one of our Lab-Rats take a sample of your blood and synthesize a dosage of pills we give to our taste testers to counteract any weight gain they experience while on the job."

"I'm skeptical to believe you did this out of the goodness of your heart..."

"And rightfully so you little glutton!" Elena poked her nose a second before holding up a vial of pills, "you see, one must keep taking the requires doasge or else all of that weight will come pouring back, and unfortunately, with what you intended to do tonight, I'm not feeling very inclined to give you anymore.

"Not my fault your company warranted my attention," Claire spat, "I read some of those testing reports about the chocolates."

Elena sighed as she pulled a chair to Claire's side and sat next to her. With a cross of her legs and a flick of her hair, she turned Claire's chair until they were staring each other both in the eyes.

"Yes well," the brunette began, "because of that we unfortunately cannot let you leave this building anymore."

"You're holding me prisoner here?!?" A gasp left Claire's lips as the fear inside evolved into terror with the revelation that she might not have a way out of here.

"Prisoner? No, nothing so barbaric." Elena scoffed as she straightened her collar out and stood up. "No considering you have senstive company info I would have to immediately hire you on as a taste tester with more...permanent lodgings within this factory so that you can't leak any information to the public."

"So you'd be keeping me here against my will and feeding me nothing but those pills and chocolate?" Claire's mouth fell in disbelief at the audacity of the woman to her side. What made the situation worse for her was the way Elena pursed her lips conspiratorily.

"Well, you'd be fed chocolate for the rest of your days certainly, and enough to make sure your more gluttonous side keeps this ambitious side of you under wraps." She paused, before staring coldly into the red-heads's eyes, "but considering you'd be living in one room for the rest of your life here I don't see why weight gain and immobility would be an issue to you."

"You're crazy! An absolute lunatic if you think I'm going to just let you fatten me up as a glorified chocolate muncher til the day I die!"

"I don't see how you have any choice in the matter," Elena shrugged, Claire's shoulders drooping in response as she realized what the woman was getting at. Even if they let her go they had many many options to put her and her career under, especially since they knew her identity.

"So that's it then? I'm getting carted away and that's that?"

"Unless you agree to hear out a little deal I've been crafting that is." Claire looked up in surprise, and frowned at Elena's smug grin in response to her hopeful reaction. "You see Claire, from what we've seen, you'd make a great taste tester, but I figure you might be of more use if we utilize your full skillset."

"What do you mean?"

"Oh, I've read some of your articles, top notch work at your level." Elena rose to her feet and ran her hand almost affectionately through Claire's hair, though this only served to piss the red-head off a bit. "I think that if you were to throw away that hit piece on us and say...bolster our reputation through your articles, we might be inclined to let you leave."

"Wha-" Claire bristled, not believing what she was hearing. They wanted her to write stories and lie to the public to cover their tracks and deter the authorities and other journalists? A defiant fury was building within her. This went against everything about journalistic integrity she knew! "You can't-"

"Of course we've already disposed of your personal phone and computer." Elena continued, making Claire freeze, "you'd be using our devices so we can monitor your every message, keystroke, etcetera. An associate will stop by twice a week, both to deliver what you will write about us, and to pick up your article to see if it is to our...satisfaction."

"And if I refuse?" Claire growled almost ferally, her patience with this woman exhausted the second her bribe was put forth.

"Then we go with Plan A and introduce you to the room you'll be taste testing in for the rest of your life. And I'll tell R&D to make your first batch of chocolates extra addictive." Elena smugly explained, crossing her arms as she stared down at Claire. "So? What'll it be?"

Claire grit her teeth...it sickened her that the only way to have a shot at getting away was to...blatantly boot lick Elena's company. However, the option of being permanent taste- tester didn't exactly sound appealing...

Eventually...

"You can take that deal and shove it where it belongs!" Claire spat back at the CEO, her teeth grinding in an almost uncontainable fury.

Just who did this pompous, arrogant, and awful woman think she was? Did she really think Claire would be so easily robbed of her integrity as a journalist with a few threats? No, Elena had only ensured Claire's lack of cooperation.

Besides, the redhead thought to herself, perhaps I can discover a flaw in their security and escape using that...

"Well I suppose that's a fair choice Claire," Elena giggled, patting the girl on the head patronizingly as she circled her. Like a vulture finding a worthy carcass to scavenge. "It's a shame your skills with the written word won't be lent to us, but I suppose your stomach will have to do instead."

With a snap of her fingers, Elena summoned a pair of guards. The first began unbuckling Claire's restraints, and for a brief moment Claire prepared herself to kick the man where the sun didn't shine to give her a window to run.

All that preparation went out the window however, when the other guard, a lady, promptly set a pair of chocolafes in her mouth.

Instantly Claire felt herself relax, and she let out a mewl of ecstasy as thoughts of escape became muddled, replaced by a much sweeter endeavor.

Come on Claire...let's show you to your new room... she remembered hearing as she closed her eyes in contentment. The chocolates doing their due diligence as her resistance fell apart.

Where were these nice people taking her? Wherever it is I hope it has more chocolate! Her mind cried out excitedly, while a dopey grin emerged and was promptly placated by two more confections popping into her maw.

"Tell the boys in the lab we have a new taste tester, have them focus on weight gain and addictive qualities for the chocolates." Elena spoke into a walkie talkie as she watched her new employee being carted off, "and tell the body double we hired for that reporter to begin tying up loose ends...we don't want anyone looking for our soon to be Employee of the Month."

"Understood ma'am," came the response as Elena put her hands behind her back and nodded in satisfaction.

"I hope you're ready Claire, you're about to undertake a rather...heavy burden for our company..."

The dim sound of laughter only barely registered to Claire's ears as she continued to let herself be led away, firmly caught in the clutches of this malevolent corporation...

------------------------

When she came to, Claire woke up and realized she was in a much...comfier position than she'd expected to be. As her eyes lazily fluttered open, she took a look around and found herself in a cell.

A padded, rather furnished cell with a very nice recliner in the center and a bed in the corner, but a cell nontheless.

Immediately, Claire looked around and saw the door in front of her, solid steel except for a small slit about eye level with her that was open. She figured that there wasn't any point in trying it, as it was probably locked. Looking down, she realized the chocolates fed to her by the second guard had taken their toll, and already a pot belly was beginning to form as she realized she'd put on a fair amount of chub.

"Darn, I have to find a way out lf here!" Claire hissed to herself as she scoured every inch, nook, and cranny of the room to find any kind of weakness in the structure.

Unfortunately for her, she did find something in her search, and as she crawled underneath the bed she found the very thing that had gotten her into this mess.

An unassuming box of Expansive Co. chocolate, the box marked "Experimental: Test Subject CL-41-R3 only."

"That's literally the opposite of what I need right now," Claire growled, though her true desire was betrayed as she found herself nearly ripping the box open, and did little to stop herself. Giving the chocolate a quick sniff, she found nothing wrong with the odor, and popped one into her mouth.

She collapsed onto her bed almost instantly.

"Mooo Goooood~" she nearly sang in joy as her taste buds registered the chocolate on her tongue. She was hit by a wave of scientifically engineered ecstasy as she quickly consumed the rest of the box's contents.

To hell with those other chocolates! She decided, a choir singing in her headed in praise to the things she'd just eaten, this stuff makes that other crap seem tasteless! I've gotta have more! MORE! MORE!!!

Her mind and body roared unanimously as she frantically looked around the room for more of those heavenly little candies to shovel into her gullet.

Spotting two more boxes underneath the chair, she leaped from the bed and slid to a stop in front of the containers. Without a care, she tore both boxes in half and grabbed two handfuls of chocolate to stuff herself with. After downing the two handfuls, she wasted no time in gorging herself on the remainders, sitting back with a sigh once she'd finished.

Had she not been so consumed by thoughts of chocolate, she might have taken a look at herself to realize that her breathing has slowed and become more labored, as her form suddenly began flowing out, fat adorning her cheeks, rolls peeking out from underneath her shirt, and garments tightening once more as she packed on nearly 80 pounds from those three small boxes alone.

"My my Claire..." a voice purred from the other side of the door. "I'm surprised you consuned them that fast! I'm sure the lab rats appreciate such quick results!"

"More...chocolate..." Claire mumbled lazily as she rubbed her newly formed belly, amusing herself with pinches to her new flabby additions.

"Oh don't worry Claire, you'll have plenty come tomorrow, but I'm afraid for today you'll have to wait."

"Chocolate..." Claire whimpered sadly as she nearly fell to tears now that she knew she was out of the sweet candied addiction that fueled her for the moment.

"I know I know honey..." The voice of Elena cooed gently, "but you'll have to be a good little taste tester and stay put if you want more tomorrow. You'll do that for me right?"

Claire wanted to respond, but hesitated slightly as the last remnants of her will gathered itself for a last stand. No! I can't...give in... it cried out, have to...find...a way out!

"Claaaaire?" Elena called, knocking on the door to get her attention once more. "Is that a yes I hear?"

Claire was at war with herself, and it was a losing battle for the part of her not completely lost to the chocolate loving monster she was turning into. Even if she didn't give in here, was there truly an escape? Wouldn't it be so mucb better to just accept her situation and get more chocolate?

For a few minutes, Claire didn't respond, merely staring blankly at the ground in front of her. Elena tapped her foot impatiently, knowing she had better things to do as she checked her watch. Had the girl's been so decayed that she couldn't even answer questions now?

Fed up, the CEO of Expansive Candies swiftly turned with a huff, and began to walk off until...

15.content:
From the highest window at the Expansive Candy Factory, a young woman smiled down as a group of visitors were led towards the entrance to the factory. Her factory. Elena Exco, the chairwoman of Expansive Candy, was the daughter of wealthy industrialist Jonathan Exco, who had passed away in mysterious circumstances two years ago. Elena had been left her father's vast fortune in his will, and had, much to her detractors surprise, managed to turn around the fortunes of his small, failing company. Elena, with her business acumen, enthusiasm and passion for candy, had taken the company global in only a few months.

Now, the pieces were in place. The first factory was complete, stores opening up around this backwater town and customers eager to get their hands on her product. Elena couldn't wait to see the results. Once this town was hooked, she would move onto the next, and the next, and the next...

Elena saw her guests filter in through the gates and prepared to greet them. She took a moment to admire herself in the mirror of her lavish, brightly decorated office. She was only 26, but already a titan of the industry. Framed magazine covers from Time were across her wall, from when she had won "Youngest businesswoman of the century" a few weeks ago. Due to certain...enhancements she had discovered in her candy's properties, she had been able to adjust her own body in exactly the way she wanted.

Expansive Candy was no ordinary candy; it was manufactured with very special ingredients, discovered by her father, which, when consumed in refined form, could have a very significant effect on a person's body and metabolism. Elena, through trial and error, had found this out, and had been able to transform herself from a skinny geek to a gorgeous bombshell. She was particularly proud of her DD cup breasts and shapely bubble butt. Her stomach was perfectly trim and toned and she had even gained a few inches in height. She had dyed her hair purple, the signature colour of the company, and wore a white and pink striped skirt and purple tank top, which drew attention to her figure. She wasn't one for formality.

But unlike the candy that Elena had consumed to refine her appearance, the candy that her customers would be eating would be quite different. It was much more potent and uncontrollable, and would even effect their minds. She couldn't wait until she controlled the entire town...

Taking the elevator from her personal office to the ground floor, she stepped out to find her guests gathered around, waiting for her. There were four of them in total, all of whom had received a surprise invite to the factory for an exclusive tour. Elena had hand picked every one of them.

Her first choice had been Charlotte, something of a minor celebrity - or as a close as you could get to one - in this town. Charlotte was gorgeous, with supermodel good looks and impeccable fashion sense. She had long, black hair a perfect figure; not quite as curvy as Elena's enhanced frame, but certainly one to make any woman envious. She looked like she belonged on a movie set, not a factory floor. Despite her good looks, however, she had struck Elena as a little shallow and vain. She was mostly just known for being an Instagram influencer, rather than doing anything particularly noteworthy.

Beside Charlotte was a couple who had been invited on the tour together, Jenna and Matt. Elena had chosen them due to their great physical fitness. Jenna was a pretty, blonde girl in her early 20's. She had, Elena discovered, been a cheerleader in high school, and now she was a champion swimmer. Matt, her boyfriend, stood the tallest of the group at just over six foot, and was lean and muscular. He worked as a personal trainer at the local gym, and it showed. He had chiselled good looks, a handsome face and, Elena had to admit, a great body.

Looking like the odd one out was another girl, Sophie. Sophie had been chosen for the tour more due to Elena recognising her potential; she was a chef at a local cake shop, and had won awards for her recipes and designs. Cake wasn't exactly candy, but her creativity with icing, flavouring and sugar had appealed to Elena. Unlike the super fit Charlotte, Matt and Jenna, Sophie was a little shorter and less striking. She was very pretty, with a cute face framed by a thick pair of glasses and freckled cheeks. Her auburn hair was tied back in a pony tail, and she was looking around eagerly.

"Welcome!" Elena said as she approached. "You probably recognise me, of course, but I am Elena Exco, head of the company. You can call me Elena."

Charlotte looked unimpressed. Matt and Jenna smiled politely, and Sophie let out a small squeal of excitement.

"Now, I'm sure you're all eager to get on with the tour, so let's get started," Elena said, ushering her guests towards the large double doors ahead...

---

15.title: The Grand Tour

choices: Charlotte keeps snapping pics, and Elena is getting angry...
Charlotte samples some of the candy fruit...

Charlotte wonders off from the tour...
151.content:
Charlotte rolled her eyes as the bizarrely dressed Elena lead the way. Why she had decided to choose that weird, multicoloured outfit was anyone's guess, but the girl clearly needed some fashion tips. Charlotte was still a little confused as to how she had even ended up on this tour; the letter with a free "golden ticket" had just randomly arrived in the post for her one day, and it wasn't like she usually blogged or live-streamed about candy. Her Instagram was usually holidays, clubs, make up and fashion.

Still, she wasn't complaining, it was a pretty exclusive invite, and if it brought her a few new followers, all the better. Charlotte had over 600,000 followers on Instagram, a twitch channel and an OnlyFans account where she posted lewd pictures of herself in skimpy outfits...or nothing at all. Her good looks had gotten her very far in life so far, and she usually took in a lot of money from her fans each month. Hopefully, she could attract some more revenue today with her live blogging the tour.

Charlotte had opted to wear an outfit that drew attention to her body today, as usual. She was wearing a pair of hip hugging denim shorts which just about covered her butt, with a tank top that was tied in a knot beneath her perfect breasts, exposing that toned, tanned stomach.

Producing her phone from her pocket of her denim jean shorts, Charlotte held it up and hit record. "Hey guys! Charlotte here, live from the new Expansive Candy factory. Guess who got a free tickettttttttttttttt?" She smiled, showing her whitened teeth.

"Excuse me, Charlotte ," Elena turned around to face her. "I'm going to have to ask you to put that phone away. Everything from this point on is classified."

"Ugh, fine," Charlotte sighed. "You heard the lady guys, guess I'm just going to have to let you know more later, chao!" She signed off and uploaded the video before continuing. She had no intention of just walking around here without taking any more pictures or videos. That would have made for a very boring day...

"Now, then onto the first part of the tour, the chocolate fountain!" Elena declared.

Charlotte followed, alongside the others, as Elena pushed open another set of doors and led them into what looked like a large, artificial garden. Instead of a factory floor, she found herself treading on very realistic grass. The room seemed to go on for miles, and she was amazed she had missed it when she first approached the building. Through the room, she noted that there were trees and bushes that seemed to be growing...candy? Candy canes stuck out of the ground, chocolate bars hung off the trees and candy flowers were growing on plants.

While Elena's back was turned, she quickly whipped out her phone and took a picture, before continuing on.

On the far side of the room was a huge, flowing fountain that connected to the ceiling and flowed into a river which ran through the centre of the room. Charlotte cheekily snapped another picture. She had to admit, it was impressive.
151.title: Charlotte

1512.content:
"Alright everyone,control your appetites,I'll answer any questions you may have." Elena said aloud. She seemed to want to add in the words "we are not children" but left it out in case her bosses overheard. The group all spanned out and Elena occasionally walked over to someone's waving hand.

Charlotte occupied herself by going over to the grove It was if someone took the entire world's fruit supply and made an orchard for them.While there were only one bush,tree,or fern for each fruit, all of them seemed to be ready to harvest. But the fruits that were on the greenery shined a little, as if they were covered in sugar.

"Is this a diorama? Some sort of artist work" Charlotte thought. "Does it matter though, i'm going to get so many hits, oh wait."

"Excuse me, Miss Elena?" The tour guide walked over to the Instagram e-celeb. Charlotte pointed a thumb at the area. "Why are the fruits all shiny? Are they fake?"

"Oh no dear, they are completely edible. These are our 'Candy Fruties' specially made and all around great. Actual fruits that taste much sweeter than their mundane counterparts." Elena explained. "Our eggheads did their best to make a special genetically modified plant that not only mimics all fruit bearing flora, but give each and everyone of them this luxurious gleam. And not only that, but you can eat the skin as well!"

Elena smiled at Charlotte.

"So I can just." Charlotte began to reach over to grab a fruit, Elena interrupted this action with a quick 'tsk' from her mouth.

"No, no, dear. If you want to eat some you'll have to give me a few moments to call in my workers. They'll prepare something quite delectable, but never eat a fruit straight from the branch."

Charlotte nodded and complied, Elena smiled at the girl and quickly made a call to someone, turning her back on Megan as she took the call. Charlotte watched for a few moments until she looked back at the enticing fruit.

"What harm can one fruit do to me? She already said its edible."

And with that, Charlotte picked what she'd stuff into her mouth...

15122.content:
With some nimble steps and quick reflexes, Charlotte paced over to the fruit she had picked out when she first laid eyes on the garden. It was a pear tree that stood proud and high and Charlotte wondered how would she get up to the branches. She scratched her chin for a bit and jumped back in shock as the branch lowered itself down towards her.

"Um..hello?" She politely asked the tree. The branch drooped but didn't react to the woman's voice. The e-celeb took very precise steps until she could reach a hand towards the branch and pluck a fruit off. She jumped back,waiting for the sign that the tree was a sentient being. Nothing came from her theft.

"I better get outta here." She mumbled. Placing the pear into her pocket, Charlotte made her way back towards the outer rim of the garden. There Elena stood tapping her foot up and down,her eyebrow raised as the woman approached.

"Sorry Miss Elena, I was just trying to pick out my fruit for that 'delectable' food you were offering." Charlotte lied to the guide.Unbeknownst to her, Elena knew exactly what she had done. In some sealed off area of the facility, a small betting pool had been going to see what fruit Charlotte picked.

Elena skillfully acted as though she believed that lie.

"Why of course! I do apologize if I seemed like I was admonishing you for your selection." Elena said."Have you've picked your course?"

"Pear." Charlotte replied. Elena nodded at that fact.

"Good choice, well it seems the rest of our little group has gotten enough of out gardens and would like to see where our 'magic' happens. We'll meet at the tail end of the chocolate river." Elena explained. She sauntered off with a smirk, Charlotte shrugged at that fact. With eager hands,and a much more eager mouth, she took a bite of the pear. Instantly her taste-buds were overwhelm, it was like eating pear plus one!

Charlotte's bites became rapid chunk taking off of the pear, which she soon finished in under three minutes. She licked her lips and wiped her hands onto her top.

"Let's go see the rest of this place." Charlotte announced before she expertly hid the core of the pear under some shadowed bushes.

152.content:
"She seems enthusiastic," Jenna nudged her boyfriend in the arm as they followed their guide through the doors.

"She seems nice," Matt shrugged.

"You were just staring at her boobs," Jenna said with a smirk.

"I was not," Matt said defensively. "They are pretty big though..."

Jenna and Matt had met in college, while he had been study health and fitness, and she had been taking business studies. Matt had made no secret of the fact that his ambition was to one day own and manage a gym in town. Jenna, however, was a little more uncertain as to what her future held. She had often been stereotyped as air headed in high school purely because she was on the cheer squad; but nothing could have been further from the truth, she had studied really hard, and got a first class honours degree in college...she just wasn't really sure what her future held now.

She and Matt had first met when they noticed each other on their morning jog. After two weeks on running past one another, Matt had finally plucked up the courage to ask Jenna out, and she had immediately said yes, having been hoping he would do just that. They had been together ever since, and now lived together, having moved in just after graduating.

They had both been surprised to get the invite to the grand opening of the factory, and Jenna hadn't even really wanted to come, but Matt had suggested she take a break from planning her future career to have some fun. What exactly was fun about this place, however, she wasn't sure...

As they passed through the doors, they found themselves in a large, open space resembling a huge garden. The room seemed to go on for miles, and she was amazed she had missed it when she first approached the building. Through the room, she noted that there were trees and bushes that seemed to be growing...candy? Candy canes stuck out of the ground, chocolate bars hung off the trees and candy flowers were growing on plants. There were also large, oddly shiny looking fruit growing everywhere; she spotted blueberries, strawberries and pears, just to name a few.
152.title: Jenna and Matt

choices: Go eat some of the candy forest
Go have some lunch with Alana
Go to The Cabinet
1523.content:
"You wanna try some of the candy?" Matt said to his girlfriend. Jenna smiled at the suggestion,her previous talk with the man faded away in her mind. The couple paced over to candy section of the land ignoring the fruits all around them. They gaped at the selection of confectioneries all around them.

"Hey what's that overthere?" Matt questioned. Jenna followed the man as he led them farther into the candy flora.

"What did you see?" Jenna asked.

"It looked like something glowed behind all this stuff. It was like it was metal or something." Matt walked farther inwards and Jenna soon noticed how every plant seemed to grow larger the farther they traveled. The candy though got more exotic in appearance, though not to the point of being alien.White chocolate bars and mint chocolate candy canes were just some of the new sweets that were revealed.

"Matt, I don't think we should be here."

"Why would they not cut this area off if they didn't want anyone to see it?" Matt answered. Soon though the duo came to a large clearing, a brief shadow passed by the pairs eyes, but their view was quickly filled by the area in front of them. A large house, which seemed to be made of gingerbread, was built with a small pavilion in front of it. A decorated fountain was the epicenter of this clearing. Tables, though untended,were scattered around randomly. One chair and table was filled however, with a young woman drinking from a teacup.

"Hello?" Jenna hesitantly introduced herself. The woman looked up from her cup and smiled, she placed it onto the table to greet the pair.

"Ah you must be some of the contestants, I'm Alana, pleased to meet you." Alana dusted herself off to give the pair an open handshake. She was dressed in a modest pair of workshorts and a sun-flower shirt;Matt noted her seemingly curveless body compared to Elena,though didn't choose to vocalize that point.

"What's this place?" Jenna said. She sat down onto a chair, while Matt stood looking at the working woman.

"This is The Cabinet,though management has some gobbley-gook name for it. Its where we display our really sweet stuff, things that are not planted in the candy forest." Alana explained.

"So is that where the candy for the factory is made?" Matt asked.

"Oh no, that's down the chocolate river, hopefully you'll see it during the tour. No, here is the place where our perfected goods are displayed." Alana took a sip of her tea. "You can knock on the door if you'd like, Denise will gladly show you what we have in stock at the moment."

"Noted." Jenna spoke. "But why change it out though? Who eats the candy or whatever else you have in there?"

"Us workers and the little gals. Ahh you don't need to worry about the little gals though, they won't bother you on the tour." Alana said nonchalantly. "Oh if you'd like, we can have a small lunch together, I can phone in Elena to tell her where you two are at."

Jenna and Matt shared a look, both pondered on what to do next.

15233.content:
"Let's try The Cabinet, Matt!" Jenna asked excitedly. The man looked over to his girlfriend and nodded in response. Jenna 'squee' in delight as the two made their way from Alana towards The Cabinet. Alana smiled before she took out a walkie-talkie.

"Hey Miss Elena, yeah, two of the targets are making their way towards Denise." Alana spoke. She put away the walkie-talkie and continued to drink her tea.

The gingerbread building would've been quite imposing if it wasn't, you know, made of gingerbread. Was the building actually made of gingerbread though? That didn't make it look structurally sound. But if the duo dwelled on that thought, they'd have question the candy forest that laid behind them.

"Do we knock or?" Jenna asked until the door creaked open. The two jumped up in surprise, only to see a fairly tall woman peak her head out. She wore,of all things, a purple dress stylized to fit the candy themed surroundings. Her earrings were some sort of sweat.

"Welcome you two,I'm glad that two contestants have chosen to grace this humble abode." She stepped aside to allow the two in. The couple hesitantly walked in until the very calming looking interior made their journey inwards much less hair-raising.The smell of frankincense and hazelnut filled the air. Stairs that led to the second floor spiraled upwards. The two gaped in shock.

"Come, lets get to the store," Denise interrupted their gape. The duo nodded and approached what was probably the store section of this building. Glass drawers and stands greeted them, signs were placed on top of the glass that read what candies they held.

"Look around and tell me what you like," Denise said.

153.content:
Sophie was definitely eager to get started. Though the other guests didn't seem that into it, Sophie had been incredibly excited for this tour ever since she received the invite. She had no idea what she had done to prompt the mysterious invitation, but she half hoped, if it wasn't too immodest, that her work had somehow drawn her to the attention of Elena and her company. She had been following the young company exec admiringly for some time, watching her rise to fame and success. They were the same age, and Elena was a role model of sorts.

While Sophie certainly took pride in her work, she had started to feel like her talents were a little wasted at work. Her creativity was stymied and her bosses were quite controlling. They often put down her more esoteric ideas and designs, wanting things that was more traditional and conventional. Sophie was a shy girl, and didn't really have the courage to stand up to them. She had often found herself without much confidence. Even amongst this group, she felt a little invisible next to the glamorous Elena, sexy Megan and athletic Matt and Jenna.

"So, when do we get to see how you make the candy?" Sophie asked excitedly, sidling up to their hostess.

"I like your enthusiasm, Sophie," Elena winked at her with a smile. "But patience, there's plenty to see before we get there. I really enjoyed your cake decorations, such creativity."

Sophie clasped her hands together and gave a happy little squeal. "Oh my god, thank you so much. I had no idea you'd even seen my work but I thought maybe you might have I don't know oh my god..." She rambled on, fangirling enthusiastically.

Elena laughed. "Oh yes, I took the time to get to know all the guests on the tour. I was really very impressed with your cakes. You have a bright future."

Sophie couldn't believe what she was hearing. "Do you think I might be able to work for you one day?"

"Maybe sooner than you think," Elena smiled.

Sophie gave a little squeal again as Elena turned back to address the others, welcoming them to the first part of the tour. As Elena spoke, Sophie's head was filled with ideas about her future, what roles she could work in, what candy she could create, what flavours she could come up with...maybe she would have a job by the end of the tour! And her parents had always said it was a waste of her talents going into this business. Ha!

Sophie walked on ahead, following the other's into the first room. Instead of a factory floor, she found herself treading on very realistic grass. The room seemed to go on for miles, and she was amazed she had missed it when she first approached the building. Through the room, she noted that there were trees and bushes that seemed to be growing...candy? Candy canes stuck out of the ground, chocolate bars hung off the trees and candy flowers were growing on plants.

"This is amazing!" Sophie said out loud, running forward and admiring the garden. She couldn't believe they had created something so fantastic. She had to know more...

155.content:
Dorothea:

Job: College Student at Spring Falls College

Age: 18

Appearance: Long brown hair, beginnings of an hourglass figure

Preferring to go by Dora rather than Dorothea, Dorothea doesn't work for Expansive Candy. Instead, her father works somewhere within the main factory, though he refuses to say where exactly. After every shift, he returns home with a bag of candy in hand, candy he's more than willing to pass onto his darling daughter.

Dorothea herself studies English at Spring Falls College, and hopes to become a famous author someday. She's a kind person who enjoys being social, however if she gets into a creative mood, she tends to shut herself off from the world until she works it out of her system. Likewise, writer's block can cause her to hide away.

=====


Riley:

Job: Cleaner within the Main Factory

Age: 26

Appearance: Short blonde hair, thin figure with a chubby belly

Having jumped from job to job since leaving high school, the role of Cleaner was not one Riley initially envisioned for herself, yet the pay and additional benefit of sneaking candy home with her convinced her to take the job.

An eternally optimistic person, Riley tends to live in her own little world. Not much can lower her mood while in public, however acting so cheerful leaves her exhausted and hungry in the evenings, leading to her putting on a little weight.

Or perhaps you want more characters?
155.title: Two new characters

choices: Dorothea has a few candies...

Just then, her phone rings...
1551.content:
"Urgh, not again!"

With an exasperated exhale, Dorothea crumbled up yet another piece of paper and swiped it from her desk, where it joined countless other paper balls, each bearing the exact same opening sentence. With her desk clear, she leaned forward, resting her forehead atop it.

"I've been at this for hours now!" Dorothea sighed, lightly drumming the back of her head. "And I just can't get the wording right! The girl... The girl... The girl focused... No, she thought hard... Argh!"

In one swift motion, she sat up and jumped to her feet, her chair rolling back a few inches. Intertwining her finger behind her head, she strolled around her room, stepping over other failed attempts at writing. This wasn't even her first attempt at beginning her assignment, it was her third!

On her first attempt, she had gotten about a page into her work before deciding it wasn't up to her usual standards, at which point she had torn the page in half and then in half again before dropping it into the trash. Her second attempt hadn't even reached a full page before she destroyed it and now, on her third, she couldn't even get an opening sentence! It was enough to drive her absolutely insane!

"Maybe I need a break! Yeah, that should do it!" Dorothea came to a halt at the foot of her bed. With a deep inhale, she prepared to fall forwards into its soft embrace, to drift off into a sweet, dreamless sleep that would leave her feeling refreshed and ready to try again for the fourth time...

"Dorothea, I'm home!"

Hearing the front door open, followed by the voice of her father, Dorothea halted her fall, pushing herself back onto her feet. With a smile on her face, she raced for her door, prepared to rush downstairs and see her father. As soon as her hand grabbed the doorknob...

"If you're coming down, don't forget to dress properly!"

"U-Uh..." She paused, glancing down at herself. She was indeed dressed, however it wasn't what most people would call 'decent'. While her bottom half was clad in a pair of baggy pyjamas pants, she wore only a bra on her upper body, a bra that was getting rather snug around her ample chest. Grabbing the matching top, she hurriedly threw it on and ran downstairs, a wide smile on her face. "Dad!"

Her father, who was busy rummaging around the kitchen, stopped just in time to get tackled by her. The duo chuckled between themselves for a moment before Dorothea pulled away, smile still on her face. However, it lasted only for a few seconds before vanishing, replaced with a stern expression.

"Dad, you're working way too late!" She chided him, watching as he dug around in the fridge. "I barely see you anymore!"

"Oh, I'm sorry, Dora..." He apologized, pulling a container marked with his name from the fridge. "I promise, I'll make it up to you. Right now, in fact!"

Setting his dinner off to the side, he moved to the table and picked up his bag. Unzipping it, he shifted some stuff inside before producing a transparent bag filled with various small objects. Handing it to Dorothea, she inspected the bag.

"Candy?" She asked, recovering an affirmative nod in response. "Well... I suppose it's something... Thanks, Dad".

Giving him another hug, she watched her father rush around the kitchen, a sad smile on her face. Since starting at that new candy factory, she had been seeing less and less of him, only really seeing him in the evenings or, occasionally, some mornings she managed to get up early.

"I'm off to bed, Dad," Dorothea finally said, inching towards the archway leading to the stairs. "Don't stay up too late!"

"I won't..." Her father chuckled. "Goodnight, Dora".

"Night!"

Returning to her room, she quickly discarded her top and flipped down atop her bed, bag of candy still clutched in her hand. She eyed it for a few moments, curious about its contents. She had heard nothing but good things about the stuff that factory was producing. Normally she didn't like to eat anything sugary before bed, but surely a few candies wouldn't hurt?
1551.title: Dorothea

Curious to see the candies were as good as people said they were, Dorothea sat up. Gripping her goodie bag, she hesitated, recalling the last time she was allowed sugar before bed. According to her father, it had taken him hours to convince her to return to her bed, only for her to immediately escape and continue rushing around the house. But she had been a kid then. She was an adult now, capable of controlling herself!

"Let's see what I've got..." Gently tearing open the bag, she poured its contents into her bed and began to pick through them. "Chocolate balls, gobstoppers, strawberry laces, fizzy cola bottles... An awful lot of variety for just a simple goodie bag! Hmmm..."

Reaching out a hand, Dorothea scooped up...

155111.content:
"These look particularly nice!"

Scooping up a handful of wrapped chocolate balls, Dorothea rolled one between her fingers. It was perfectly smooth, a slight shine to its brown surface. Setting the chocolate balls off to the side, she returned the rest of the candies to their bag and set it atop her nightstand, making a mental note to share them with her class. Not everything in that bag was to her liking, and she wouldn't want to throw out perfectly good candy.

Grabbing one of the chocolate ball, she quickly unwrapped it, eager to taste it. Chocolate was a particular weakness of hers, especially milk chocolate. It was just so rich and creamy... And the way it melted atop her tongue, spreading its divine taste all around her mouth... Oh, how she loved it!

"Down the hatch!"

Dropping the small sphere into her mouth, she allowed it to sit atop her tongue for a moment, softening the sweet treat slightly, before chomping down. The taste of caramel filled her mouth, pulling a delighted moan from her. Swallowing hungrily, she reached for a second one, eager to taste it again. The caramel was so sublimely sugary, the chocolate was so thick and milky...

"Mmm... Sho gud!" Dorothea mumbled as she pressed three caramel ball into her mouth at the same time. She teased one with her tongue, rolling it around her mouth, while she pushed the other two to either side and allowed them to slowly melt. Falling backwards, she allowed her treats to dissolve in her mouth, eventually releasing their sugary innards. "Ohhhh..."

Swallowing, her eyes gradually fluttered shut, the sugar apparently having no affect on her...

=====


"More!"

Dorothea slammed a fist down on the arm of her chair. The room around her shook and, seemingly from nowhere, small brown spheres rained down around her. With excited hands, she began to grab as many of them as she could, ramming them hungrily into her mouth.

"More... More..."

These were the only words she could utter as she devoured more and more of the heavenly chocolate rain. With each handful, her hunger for more grew, her thoughts turned to the caramel balls...

"Gimme more!"

A giant ball landed in her lap, easily the size of her own head. Yet its size did nothing to deter her as she picked it up and dug in, quickly demolishing a hole in the outer chocolate layer to reveal the amber insides. Lifting it to her lips, she hungrily chugged the thick liquid, ignoring the bloating sensation in her midriff...

=====

*RIIINNNGGG*

Dorothea sat bolt upright as an alarm rang through her room. Glancing towards her alarm, her eyes went wide as she saw the time.

"Half eight... I need to get ready!"

Jumping out of bed, she began to rush around her room. Pulling her pyjama bottoms off, she replaced them with a pair of denim jeans. Pulling on a black shirt and her favourite red leather jacket, she ran for the door, pausing partway to scoop up her bag. As she passed her mirror, she paused again, noticing something off with her reflection...

1551112.content:
"What the heck?" Dorothea raised an eyebrow as she caught something off with her skin. She had rather fair skin, not so light that people would think she spent all her time hiding from the Sun's rays, but not so dark that they'd think she spent every hour of every day bathing directly in them either. But rather than her pale, almost ivory, skin meeting her gaze, slightly tanned skin greeted her. "W-What? Why am I..."

Stepping closer to her reflection, Dorothea inspected herself. It was a noticeable enough change in hue, one that, upon further inspection, wasn't restricted to her face. A quick glance down her top revealed that her torso had also changed colour, looking more brown than white. Her hands, her legs, even her feet had all changed!

"People don't just tan overnight!" She said, scratching her arm just in case it rubbed off, which it didn't. "And it doesn't even look like a tan! More like I've been this colour my whole life..."

Staring at herself for another minute, Dorothea eventually shook herself from her thoughts. While the change was concerning, it wasn't affecting her in any discernible way. And she was running late...

I'll check it later! For now, I need to get to class!

And with that, she ran from her room.

=====


Just in time!

Dropping into her usual seat at the back of the room, Dorothea pulled her books from her bag and prepared for the lesson. After yesterday's failed attempts at beginning her assignment, she was looking forwards to this distraction. Her professor was a witty guy, always throwing around puns and metaphors that, once in a blue moon, broke her from her block. She just hoped that today was one of those days.

"Good morning, class!" Her professor, Doctor Griffin, strode into the room, a bright smile on his face. "I hope everybody is ready for an enlightening session!"

Standing behind his desk, he looked out over the room, receiving a few chuckles in response. The lights in his class had been broken for almost a week now, leading to no end of light based puns.

"Broken lights aside, lets begin with today's lesson!"

As he began to teach, Dorothea relaxed, yesterday's issues with writing and her earlier worries over her newly browned skin vanishing into the back of her mind...
1551112.title: Chocolate Coloured

choices: Dorothea finds herself craving more chocolate balls...
Dorothea moves onto her next class...
Dorothea returns home to find her father waiting for her...
15511122.content:
"So what was Mark Twain trying to convey to us, the readers, in this particular paragraph?"

Dorothea glanced down at the paragraph in question, quickly scanning it a couple of times. Usually, she was rather good at picking out the keywords and working out what they meant, but today... She just wasn't feeling it. With each reading, the words blurred closer and closer together until the page was one big black mess.

What is up with me today? Dorothea wondered, flipping back a page only to find it was just as blurry. I'm just... so tired...

A long yawn escaped her mouth as she sank into her seat. The benches the College provided for students were uncomfortable at best, receiving no end of complaints from people nursing numb backsides, but in her unexplainably exhausted state, the wood felt just right for a quick nap.

Just... Just a few minutes... I shouldn't miss out on anything big...

With another yawn, she leaned forwards, folding her arms atop the desk to form a makeshift pillow. Resting her head atop them, she did her best to focus on whatever Doctor Griffin was teaching but, before she knew it, her eyes had closed...

=====


"Dad!"

A bright smile adorned Dorothea's face as her father strode into the kitchen. He clutched his usual brown briefcase in his left hand while the right held a large bag of familiar brown balls. Her smile only widened when she caught sight of the delectable treats.

"More candies!"

Her father smiled before disappearing in a puff of smoke, the bag falling to the ground and spilling its contents everywhere. Dorothea fell to her knees, extending her arms and gesturing for the candies to roll towards her. They all obeyed, changing directions and heading straight for her. Upon reaching her, they began to neatly stack atop one, forming layer upon layer until a pyramid consisting of caramel chocolate balls had appeared in front of her.

"Oh, so many chocolates..." Dorothea inched towards the pyramid, the tip of the structure level with the top of her head. Reaching a hand up, she carefully plucked the top chocolate away, slowly unwrapping it and dropping the ball into her mouth. "I forgot how good these tasted... I need more!"

Throwing caution to the wind, Dorothea began to ferry chocolate after chocolate to her mouth. With each one she swallowed, her hunger only grew, demanding she eat more. She was all too happy to obey, now grabbing handfuls of the balls. She was barely even chewing anymore, intent on eating as much as she could.

"That's it, fill me up! Fill me full of your sweet caramel!"

Dorothea moaned as the words left her mouth. She felt so incredibly full, yet she just couldn't stop herself from eating. As she reached the last layer of the once glorious pyramid, she fell forwards, landing comfortably atop something soft. Glancing down at herself, she caught sight of her rounding body. Her perfectly spherical belly, stuffed full of chocolate and caramel. Her thickening ass, each cheek round and hefty, rising high into the air...

"W-Wait, what's happened to me?!" The sight of her body broke her from her ravenous state, worry washing over her. Moving her hands down to her belly, she began to rub it, only to find doing so caused her skin to rapidly darken. With a scream, she yanked her arms away and tried to stand, however her legs refused to obey her. Her arms reached out, resuming their frantic feeding. "Mmph! No more..."

Her body refused to obey, stuffing her with more and more candy. Ann's with each one, she swelled larger and larger, her body becoming increasingly spherical...

=====

"N-No!"

Dorothea awoke with a jolt, startling the people sitting on either side of her. Ignoring their startled gazes, she sat up and rubbed her eyes, somewhat disoriented after her nap.

"I... I'm still me..." Dorothea sighed in relief as she gripped her flat belly. "God, what a weird dream... No more candy before bed for me..."

Rubbing her eyes again, Dorothea returned her attention to the front of the room, only for Doctor Griffin to conclude the lesson.

"I'll see everybody in a couple of days!" He announced to the room. "Remember, we'll be moving onto a new author next lesson, so make sure to decide which one you want me to cover! Goodbye for now!"

The room began to pack up, all aside from Dorothea who was still trying to understand her weird dream...

I’m on a roll today!”

Humming with nothing in the world bothering her anymore, Dorothea fails to notice she earns a few stares from the boys as they drink in her body, commenting on her tan skin. What they fail to notice and what even Dorothea fails to notice is a very small change, only noticeable if one peered at the roots of her hair, as it changes color, going from the dark brown she always have, to a lighter brownish blonde, caramel like color.

15511123.title: A Start Of A Productive Day For Dorothea!

choices: During class, Dorothea notices some of her classmates look a little different...

155111232.content:
Practically skipping to her next class, Dorothea was the very picture of cheerfulness. Sure, her day had started off weird, what with her skin suddenly changing colours, but now it felt like absolutely nothing else could go wrong!

"Hopefully this feeling translates over to my writings later!" Dorothea hummed to herself as she rounded a corner, the classroom door coming into view. "And I hope this next class doesn't... Hmm?"

Coming to a stop, the joyful girl fished her phone from her pocket. Glancing down at the screen, a familiar number greeted her, one she didn't hear from all that often. When she did hear from it, however, it was usually something pretty bad.

"Well, that's my day ruined..." Dorothea grumbled before answering, lifting the phone to her ear. "Hello?"

"Hello. Am I speaking to Ms Dorothea Browne?" A bored masculine voice answered her.

"Of course you are, Christopher, do you really need to ask every single time you ring me?" Dorothea asked with a sigh.

"Just need to verify your identity, Ms Browne", Christopher answered. "It wouldn't do for me to talk with some stranger, after all".

I'd rather be talking with some stranger. They'd be more interesting than you, Dorothea thought with a smirk. "Whatever. I presume you've got a reason for calling me?"

"Of course I do. You think I enjoy our little chats?" Christopher answered with a haughty chuckle. "I'm phoning to inform you that your father will be out of town on business for a few days. He would have phoned you himself, but he has been rather busy of late".

"Great..." Dorothea's heart sank. She barely saw her father as it was, and now he was out of town? This day was turning into a rollercoaster of emotions. "Anything else?"

"Yes. It appears he arranged a daily delivery of our Caramel Chocolates to be delivered to your home. It needs to be signed for, so do try to be home. Otherwise, I have to deliver it myself and, honestly, I have better things to do with my time than act as your personal postman," Christopher chuckled again, the noise causing Dorothea to sneer.

"Isn't that what you're paid to do?" She shot back.

"I'm paid to be your father's secretary, not yours. Now, I believe that is all, so I bid you good day".

And with that, Christopher hung up. Dorothea stared down at her phone for a moment, still processing the news. She knew her father was somewhat important within the new factory that had just opened up, but that was all she knew about his job. She didn't know the title, the pay, who he worked with...

"At least he saw fit to let me know, even if it was through that git," Dorothea grumbled, pocketing her phone. "Anyway, happy thoughts, happy thoughts... Back to class!"

And with that, she started towards her class...

1551112323.content:
Dorothea went through her classes, besides the looks she received for her tanner skin and the call from the jerk of a secretary her father has at his mysterious position at his job, the rest of the day was enjoyable. It was almost like she just flew through her other three classes. Dorothea goes to her car, a clunky old looking car in order to have home as her stomach goes off. “Strange I could have sworn I have eaten enough for lunch….” Dorothea thinks placing a tanned hand on her stomach and rubs it as if it would ease away her hunger. “Either way I better get going home, that package that ass told me about should be coming soon.”

Easing herself into the car as her stomach goes off yet again, Dorothea growls at her own hungry as she turns her car on and drives home. The short drive feels even shorter due to how good the day wise. Soon the tanned girl is front of her home with the sight of the post man’s vehicle parked in front of her home. Pulling her car into the driveway, Dorothea barely gets a chance to make it a few steps away before the usual mail man, a large stocky guy with short black hair named Mike, uncharacteristically rushes towards her making her gasp in surprise. “Mike what’s wrong?!”

“I’m sorry Ms. Browne I am in a mad rush.” Mike say as he pushes a decent sized package into her now full arms, either not caring or not noticing the change in the skin tone of one of his usuals. “A lot of people have ordered from that candy factory your father works at. So I got hurry and get this all delivered before the day ends. You would think the Expansive Factory would deliver it to their customers personally.”

“Yeah right if there more guys like Christopher in that place. I highly doubt that would happen unless they were forced to.” Dorothea almost bites harshly but manages to smile. Even bringing up that man makes her blood boil but for Mike’s sake she holds herself back as she quickly signs the paper needed. The stocky man sighs and waves unable to have time to offer a good bye. “Poor Mike hopefully he’s get some extra pay for this.”

Clumsily unlocking the door, Dorothea drops her school bags and places the package containing the caramel balls on the kitchen table before closing all the windows, locking the doors and making sure that no one would be able to see inside. With a sigh of relief, Dorothea takes off her top exposing her white lace bra to the world, it snugness showing that its owner really needs to stop being cheap and get some new undergarments before removing her pants and putting on a yellow fluffy pajama bottom with sleepy cartoon chicks printed all over it. For some reason she always found herself able to work harder and longer without something rubbing against her arms or stomach. Even when her father asked her long ago she was only able to tell him it just works for me to his dismay. “All set and ready to write that story of mine.”

Having already done her homework during lunch instead of hanging out with her friends, Dorothea instead gets to her collapsible laptop and turns it on, fully intent on making some progress with her story. It’s her dream to become an author, what kind of dreamer would she be if she did try every day? “Ok Dorry this time we had a nice day so we should make some progress…”

Before she could however another thought occurs to her as her green eyes stare at the package, stomach growling and craving something sweet. “Well I did get sent these in order to eat them so I should have a couple while I work.” With those words Dorothea opens the box roughly, uncaring to the careful packaging of the company who made the confections as the spheres of chocolate reveal themselves; nearly tumbling out the packaging.

In order to tempt her more, her stomach gives a loud growl making the mostly brown haired girl blush in embarrassment, making her thankful that no one is here or can see her.”Alright let’s satisfy my stomach and work at the same time….before I waste away or something for not indulging my sugary needs”

With that small joke, the woman started her work on her personal project, Dorothea puts the balls of chocolate and caramel into her mouth enjoying the sweet taste before swallowing it after it melted partially into her mouth. Suddenly having some real motivation to write, the tanned college student begins to type away every once in awhile snacking while making sure that her chocolate stained fingertips are wiped clean. Without her even realizing it, the author to be had already been snacking for some time while slaving away and before she knew it most of the box had been already eaten without her knowledge. Dorothea only stops what she is doing when-

15511123231.content:
And with this final line...

Dorothea's fingers danced nimbly across her keyboard, her gaze firmly affixed to the screen. With the speed she was typing at, there were a few spelling mistakes spread throughout her work, but she could always go back and fix them. And besides, what famous author didn't have a few errors with their first works?

"I've completed a chapter!" Dorothea let out a joyous yell, a grin spreading across her face as she saved her work. "Well, almost completed. But I can fix those little mistakes some other time. Now, I think a few chocolates are in order... Huh..."

Reaching towards her box, Dorothea's hand found nothing, her fingers scraping against the bottom of the box. Frowning, she turned away from her laptop and grabbed the box, flipping it upside down in case she had missed something. Nothing but a few discarded wrappers fluttered out of the box, causing Dorothea to sigh heavily.

"Aw, man... I was supposed to save some for when I was done!" Putting the box back together with considerably more care than she opened it with, she shut her laptop down, making sure she had actually saved her work before doing so, and got to her feet. "Urgh... Who would've guessed eating an entire box of chocolates would leave you feeling so bloated?"

Clutching her belly with both hands, she discovered that it had developed a slight curve to it, presumably due to her snacking. Wandering towards her mirror, she paused in front of it, turning to the side to get a better look at her midriff.

Still not used to seeing me with a tan, Dorothea eyed her skin for a moment before shifting her gaze down to her belly. Yeah, looks like bloating. Should be gone by the morning! If not, well... I can always walk it off!

Before leaving her mirror, she gave her belly a couple of slaps. Doing so, however, forced a chocolatey burp out of her, each one louder than the last. After unleashing a belch that would've made her own father simultaneously proud and somewhat concerned, she wisely decided to stop.

With her work done, the rest of Dorothea's evening was rather dull. After cleaning up some of the rubbish strewn around her room, she returned to her computer and began to look for a replacement for her bra, only to give up ten minutes later.

I dunno, this one just feels right... She thought to herself, staring at a rather lacy vibrant red bra. I'll give it another couple of months...

After her failed attempt at shopping, she found herself staring at Google, unsure if what she could do. She could always try more writing, but she didn't want to burn herself out this early. It was still rather early, so bed wasn't really an option.

"Let's just search something random..." Hitting a random key on her keyboard, which turned out to be 'E', a whole host of various results greeted her. "Ebay, Etsy, Expansive Candy... Actually, I wonder what shows up if I search for them?"

Clicking on Expansive Candy, a bright website greeted her. 'Expansive Candy' was printed across the top of the screen, each letter resembling a piece of candy. There was a section showing some employees, the company mandate, a product section... The usual website stuff.

"Wonder how much these chocolate balls cost?" Dorothea navigated to her new favourite snack, her eyebrow rising as she spotted their cost. "Wow, that much? Guess what Dad said is true, I do have expensive taste when it comes to snacks!"

Chuckling to herself, she shut down her laptop. With nothing else to do, she made her way downstairs, made herself something simple for dinner, made sure the front door was locked, and then retreated to her room. Grabbing her Kindle, she jumped into bed, ready to knock out a few chapters of the book she had bought recently. However, barely give minutes in, and an odd exhaustion washed over her.

"Alright... Guess that's me for the day..." Dorothea dropped her Kindle on her nightstand and, one hand resting atop her belly, slowly drifted off to sleep...

1551112323112.content:
"I'll see how today goes," Dorothea said to herself, gathering up her dirty plates and dumping them in the sink. "If I feel weird or sick, I'll just politely excuse myself and head straight home. But everything should be fine. It's probably just a reaction to eating so many chocolates in such a short time!"

Humming happily as she washed her plate, she paused when there was a sudden tapping at the front door. Drying her hands, she started towards it.

"Somebody knocking before ten?" She hummed in thought before it hit her. Only one person ever visited before ten, though it tended to be a rare occurrence. "Mike's here already?"

Reaching the front door, her hand was resting atop the knob, ready to open it, when she suddenly remember her clothing situation. With an anxious giggle and glance down at her practically uncovered chest, she grabbed a coat from the nearby rack and quickly covered herself.

"Morning, Mike!" Dorothea greeted the stocky mailman with a smile. "Bit early for a delivery, isn't it?"

"No such thing, Ms Browne," Mike responded, his mood noticeably better than yesterday. "Anyway, if you could just sign here?"

Signing her initials, Dorothea found a familiar box handed to her, its contents rattling lightly as she held it under her arm.

"Thanks much!" Mike thanked her, pocketing his signature device. "See you tomorrow, Ms Browne".

"Yep, see you tomorrow!" Waving farewell to him, Dorothea shut and locked the door behind her. Dropping her coat off at the rack, she returned to the kitchen, dropping her parcel atop the counter. "More chocolates already? They're certainly prompt with their deliveries..."

Planning to leave the box until she got home later, her belly urged her otherwise, letting out a hungry grumble. Rubbing her bloated midriff, she groaned as she felt a hunger befall her. A hunger for chocolate...

"Maybe... Maybe a few wouldn't hurt?"

With those final words, Dorothea tore open the box with little care, tossing the crumpled lid aside. Her eyes glittered eagerly as she stared at the tiny wrapped treats, each one looking as delectable as the last. Lifting one in each hand, she quickly unwrapped them, dropping the small balls into her mouth and allowing the heat of her mouth to melt them. Sweet, succulent caramel began to fill her mouth, the taste intensifying her bodies demand for more. All too happy to obey, she ferried another couple of chocolates to her mouth, sighing happily as she filled her mouth...

A quiet creak reached Dorothea's ears, causing them to twitch. Glancing around, she cocked a confused brow when she found no apparent source for the almost inaudible creaking. Taking another few steps, she paused again when an elasticated *SNAP* echoed throughout the hallway. It was followed a light slap as her breasts, finally free of their overly tight prison, bounced slightly. Looking down at the snapped remains of her favourite bra, Dorothea tutted.

"Aw..." She knelt down, scooping up the torn garment. "This was my favourite thing to wear around the house! Now I've gotta buy a new one... Ah, I'll do it later. I look for a new one now, I'll end up being late to class!"

Returning to her room, she noted that her breasts, above average for somebody her age, had a bit more of a bounce to them than usual. As she gently laid her bra out on her bed, she glanced towards the mirror. Compared to how she looked a few days ago, she looked like a completely different person now. Tanned skin, almost chocolate coloured, a swollen gut stuffed full of chocolate, hair that was steadily changing colour from dark brown to an almost caramel hue...

I should probably see a doctor about this, Dorothea decided as she marched around her room, gathering up a new set of underwear. Her chosen bra, thankfully, fit around her breasts, though even it wad somewhat tight around them. The same went for her panties, the waistband of which were beginning to dig into her hips. It's probably just a little extra weight. I haven't exactly been eating the best the past few days.

Dressing herself in a white t-shirt decorated with a quote from Shakespeare and a pair of black jeans, she grabbed her jacket, slung her bag over her shoulder and headed back downstairs.

"I think I'm gonna walk today!" Smiling, she ignored her car keys, which were sitting in a small ceramic bowl at the side. "It's good for the mind, and I might work off some of this weight!"

Opening the door, she was about to set foot outside when she heard the ominous rumble of thunder, followed by a flash. Her smile morphed into a frown as she stepped back and grabbed her car keys.

"I'll walk tomorrow!" Her smile returned as she sprinted towards her car, the contents of her belly grumbling at the sudden exercise.

"Morning, everybody!"

The class greeted their Professor, Mrs Locke, as she strode into the room. "Uh..." Dorothea was somewhat bewildered by the greeting, but quickly recovered. "I'm looking for a certain candy. They're caramel filled chocolate balls, I'm not sure if they have an official name..."

"Ah, I know just the ones!" Carla replied, tapping her chin. "Unfortunately, the ones on our shelves are all sold out, but I can have a look in the back for you. I'll be back in a moment!"
